32422.title: From Predictive Algorithms to Automatic Generation of Anomalies
32422.zh_title: 从预测算法到异常现象的自动生成
32422.abstract: Machine learning algorithms can find predictive signals that researchers fail to notice; yet they are notoriously hard-to-interpret. How can we extract theoretical insights from these black boxes? History provides a clue. Facing a similar problem – how to extract theoretical insights from their intuitions – researchers often turned to “anomalies:” constructed examples that highlight flaws in an existing theory and spur the development of new ones. Canonical examples include the Allais paradox and the Kahneman-Tversky choice experiments for expected utility theory. We suggest anomalies can extract theoretical insights from black box predictive algorithms. We develop procedures to automatically generate anomalies for an existing theory when given a predictive algorithm. We cast anomaly generation as an adversarial game between a theory and a falsifier, the solutions to which are anomalies: instances where the black box algorithm predicts - were we to collect data - we would likely observe violations of the theory. As an illustration, we generate anomalies for expected utility theory using a large, publicly available dataset on real lottery choices. Based on an estimated neural network that predicts lottery choices, our procedures recover known anomalies and discover new ones for expected utility theory. In incentivized experiments, subjects violate expected utility theory on these algorithmically generated anomalies; moreover, the violation rates are similar to observed rates for the Allais paradox and Common ratio effect.
32422.zh_abstract: 机器学习算法能够发现研究人员未能注意到的预测信号，然而它们却以难以解释而著称。我们如何从这些黑箱中提取理论洞见？历史提供了线索。面对类似的问题——如何从直觉中提取理论洞见——研究人员常常转向“异常现象”：构建的例子，用以突出现有理论的缺陷并激发新理论的发展。典型的例子包括阿莱悖论和卡尼曼-特沃斯基关于期望效用理论的选择实验。我们建议，异常现象可以从黑箱预测算法中提取理论洞见。我们开发了在给定预测算法的情况下，为现有理论自动生成异常现象的程序。我们将异常生成视为一个理论与证伪者之间的对抗博弈，其解就是异常现象：在这些实例中，黑箱算法预测——如果我们收集数据——我们很可能会观察到违反理论的情况。作为说明，我们使用一个关于真实彩票选择的大型公开数据集，为期望效用理论生成异常现象。基于一个预测彩票选择的估计神经网络，我们的程序恢复了已知的异常现象，并为期望效用理论发现了新的异常现象。在激励实验中，受试者在这些算法生成的异常现象上违反了期望效用理论；此外，违反率与观察到的阿莱悖论和共同比率效应的比率相似。

32421.title: Understanding Economic Behavior Using Open-ended Survey Data
32421.zh_title: 利用开放式调查数据理解经济行为
32421.authors: Ingar K. Haaland, Christopher Roth, Stefanie Stantcheva, Johannes Wohlfart
32421.abstract: We survey the recent literature in economics using open-ended survey data to uncover mechanisms behind economic beliefs and behaviors. We first provide an overview of different applications, including the measurement of motives, mental models, narratives, attention, information transmission, and recall. We next describe different ways of eliciting open-ended responses, including single-item open-ended questions, speech recordings, and AI-powered qualitative interviews. Subsequently, we discuss methods to annotate and analyze such data with a focus on recent advances in large language models. Our review concludes with a discussion of promising avenues for future research.
32421.zh_abstract: 我们调查了近期经济学中利用开放式调查数据揭示经济信念和行为背后机制的文献。我们首先概述了不同的应用，包括动机、心智模型、叙事、注意力、信息传递和回忆的测量。接下来，我们描述了引出开放式回答的不同方式，包括单项开放式问题、语音记录和人工智能驱动的定性访谈。随后，我们讨论了注释和分析此类数据的方法，重点关注大型语言模型的最新进展。我们的综述最后讨论了未来研究的有前景的方向。
32421.meta: Programs：DEV, EFG, LS, ME, PE, POL；JEL：C90, D83, D91

32420.title: U.S. Worker Mobility Across Establishments within Firms: Scope, Prevalence, and Effects on Worker Earnings
32420.zh_title: 美国工人在企业内部跨机构流动：范围、普遍性及其对工人收入的影响
32420.authors: Jeronimo Carballo, Richard K. Mansfield, Charles Adam Pfander
32420.abstract: Multi-establishment firms account for around 60% of U.S. workers' primary employers, providing ample opportunity for workers to change their work location without changing their employer. Using U.S. matched employer-employee data, this paper analyzes workers' access to and use of such between-establishment job transitions, and estimates the effect on workers' earnings growth of greater access, as measured by proximity of employment at other within-firm establishments. While establishment transitions are not perfectly observed, we estimate that within-firm establishment transitions account for 7.8% percent of all job transitions and 18.2% of transitions originating from the largest firms. Using variation in worker's establishment locations within their firms' establishment network, we show that having a greater share of the firm's jobs in nearby establishments generates meaningful increases in workers' earnings: a worker at the 90th percentile of earnings gains from more proximate within-firm job opportunities can expect to enjoy 2% higher average earnings over the following five years than a worker at the 10th percentile with the same baseline earnings.
32420.zh_abstract: 多机构企业约占美国工人主要雇主的60%，这为工人提供了在不更换雇主的情况下改变工作地点的充足机会。利用美国匹配的雇主-雇员数据，本文分析了工人获得和使用此类跨机构工作转换的情况，并估计了更大的可及性（以企业内部其他就近机构的就业机会衡量）对工人收入增长的影响。虽然机构转换并非完全可观测，但我们估计，企业内部机构转换占所有工作转换的7.8%，占来自最大企业的工作转换的18.2%。利用工人所在机构在其企业机构网络中的位置差异，我们表明，在企业附近机构中拥有更大份额的工作岗位会带来工人收入的显著增长：与基线收入相同但处于第10百分位的工人相比，处于因更近的企业内部工作机会而获得收入增长的第90百分位的工人，在未来五年内的平均收入预计会高出2%。

32419.title: The Circular Economy
32419.abstract: Research about the circular economy is dominated by engineers, architects, and social scientists in fields other than economics. The concepts they study can be useful in economic models of policies – to reduce virgin materials extraction, to encourage green design, and to make better use of products in ways that reduce waste. This essay attempts to discuss circular economy in economists’ language about market failures, distributional equity, and policies that can raise economic welfare by making the appropriate tradeoffs between fixing those market failures and achieving other social goals.
32419.zh_abstract: 关于循环经济的研究主要由工程师、建筑师以及经济学以外的社会科学家主导。他们研究的概念可以用于经济政策模型——以减少原生材料开采、鼓励绿色设计、以及以减废方式更好地利用产品。本文试图用经济学家关于市场失灵、分配公平以及通过权衡修复市场失灵与实现其他社会目标来提高经济福利的政策语言来讨论循环经济。

32418.title: Understanding Demand for Police Alternatives
32418.zh_title: 理解对警察替代方案的需求
32418.authors: Bocar A. Ba, Meghna Baskar, Tony Cheng, Rei Mariman
32418.abstract: In a series of experiments, we present evidence of bipartisan public demand for police alternatives, contrasted with persistent policy resistance from key stakeholders. First, our survey experiment demonstrates that introducing U.S. respondents to dontcallthepolice.com (DCTP), a database of non-governmental emergency response options, significantly reduces reliance on police for nonviolent situations. However, this effect does not extend to violent scenarios where no police substitutes exist. Second, our follow-up survey reveals enduring impacts, including heightened recall of the 988 hotline as an alternative during suicidal crises. Third, our field experiment and qualitative interviews find police resistance to embracing DCTP, despite widespread public support for nonviolent police substitutes.
32418.zh_abstract: 在一系列实验中，我们展示了公众对警察替代方案的两党需求，与关键利益相关者持续的政策抵制形成对比。首先，我们的调查实验表明，向美国受访者介绍dontcallthepolice.com（一个非政府应急响应选项数据库）显著减少了他们在非暴力情况下对警察的依赖。然而，这种效应并未扩展到不存在警察替代方案的暴力场景。其次，我们的后续调查揭示了持久的影响，包括在自杀危机期间对988热线作为替代方案的记忆增强。第三，我们的现场实验和定性访谈发现，尽管公众广泛支持非暴力警察替代方案，但警察对接受DCTP存在抵制。

32417.title: Identifying Monetary Policy Shocks: A Natural Language Approach
32417.zh_title: 识别货币政策冲击：一种自然语言方法
32417.abstract: We develop a novel method for the identification of monetary policy shocks. By applying natural language processing techniques to documents that Federal Reserve staff prepare in advance of policy decisions, we capture the Fed's information set. Using machine learning techniques, we then predict changes in the target interest rate conditional on this information set and obtain a measure of monetary policy shocks as the residual. We show that the documents' text contains essential information about the economy which is not captured by numerical forecasts that the staff include in the same documents. The dynamic responses of macro variables to our monetary policy shocks are consistent with the theoretical consensus. Shocks constructed by only controlling for the staff forecasts imply responses of macro variables at odds with theory. We directly link these differences to the information that our procedure extracts from the text over and above information captured by the forecasts.
32417.zh_abstract: 我们开发了一种识别货币政策冲击的新方法。通过将自然语言处理技术应用于美联储工作人员在政策决策前准备的文件，我们捕捉了美联储的信息集。利用机器学习技术，我们随后基于该信息集预测目标利率的变化，并将残差作为货币政策冲击的度量。我们表明，文件文本包含关于经济的重要信息，而这些信息并未被工作人员在同一文件中包含的数值预测所捕捉。宏观变量对我们货币政策冲击的动态响应与理论共识一致。仅通过控制工作人员预测构建的冲击所隐含的宏观变量响应与理论相悖。我们将这些差异直接归因于我们的程序从文本中提取的信息，这些信息超出了预测所捕捉的信息。

32416.title: Learning from Ricardo and Thompson: Machinery and Labor in the Early Industrial Revolution, and in the Age of AI
32416.zh_title: 从李嘉图和汤普森学习：早期工业革命与人工智能时代的机器与劳动
32416.abstract: David Ricardo initially believed machinery would help workers but revised his opinion, likely based on the impact of automation in the textile industry. Despite cotton textiles becoming one of the largest sectors in the British economy, real wages for cotton weavers did not rise for decades. As E.P. Thompson emphasized, automation forced workers into unhealthy factories with close surveillance and little autonomy. Automation can increase wages, but only when accompanied by new tasks that raise the marginal productivity of labor and/or when there is sufficient additional hiring in complementary sectors. Wages are unlikely to rise when workers cannot push for their share of productivity growth. Today, artificial intelligence may boost average productivity, but it also may replace many workers while degrading job quality for those who remain employed. As in Ricardo’s time, the impact of automation on workers today is more complex than an automatic linkage from higher productivity to better wages.
32416.zh_abstract: 大卫·李嘉图最初认为机器会帮助工人，但后来修正了他的观点，这很可能基于纺织业自动化的影响。尽管棉纺织品成为英国经济中最大的部门之一，棉织工的实际工资数十年未涨。正如E.P.汤普森所强调的，自动化迫使工人进入不健康的工厂，受到严密监视且几乎没有自主权。自动化可以提高工资，但前提是伴随新任务提升劳动的边际生产率，和/或互补部门有足够的额外雇佣。当工人无法争取其生产率增长份额时，工资不太可能上升。如今，人工智能可能提升平均生产率，但也可能取代许多工人，同时降低仍在就业者的工作质量。正如李嘉图时代，自动化对当今工人的影响比从更高生产率到更好工资的自动关联更为复杂。

32415.title: Accounting for the Evolution of China’s Production and Trade Patterns
32415.zh_title: 解释中国生产与贸易模式的演变
32415.authors: Hanwei Huang, Jiandong Ju, Vivian Yue
32415.abstract: This paper studies the evolution of China's production and trade patterns during its integration into the global economy. We document and explain new facts concerning changes in production and exports at the industry and firm levels using microdata and a quantitative Ricardian and Heckscher–Ohlin model with heterogeneous firms. Counterfactual simulations reveal that capital deepening made China's production and exports more capital-intensive, although labor-biased productivity growth acted as a counterforce. Consistent with the data, our model demonstrates that China's trade openness peaked around the mid-2000s and fell until the 2020s, while the world's exposure to Chinese exports rose continuously.
32415.zh_abstract: 本文研究了中国融入全球经济过程中其生产与贸易模式的演变。我们利用微观数据以及一个包含异质性企业的定量李嘉图和赫克歇尔-俄林模型，记录并解释了行业和企业层面生产与出口变化的新事实。反事实模拟显示，资本深化使中国的生产和出口更加资本密集型，尽管偏向劳动的生产率增长起到了抵消作用。与数据一致，我们的模型表明，中国的贸易开放度在2000年代中期左右达到峰值，随后下降直至2020年代，而世界对中国出口的暴露程度则持续上升。
32415.meta: Programs：DEV, EFG, IFM, ITI；JEL：D24, E23, E25, F12, F14, F16

32414.title: The Costs and Benefits of Clan Culture: Elite Control versus Cooperation in China
32414.zh_title: 宗族文化的成本与收益：中国的精英控制与合作
32414.authors: Shuo Chen, Raymond Fisman, Xiaohuan Lan, Yongxiang Wang, Qing Ye
32414.abstract: Kinship ties are a common institution that may facilitate in-group coordination and cooperation. Yet their benefits – or lack thereof – depend crucially on the broader institutional environment. We study how the prevalence of clan ties affect how communities confronted two well-studied historical episodes from the early years of the People's Republic of China, utilizing four distinct proxies for county clan strength: the presence of recognized ancestral halls; genealogical records; rice suitability; and geographic latitude. We show that the loss of livestock associated with 1955-56 collectivization (which mandated that farmers surrender livestock for little compensation) documented by Chen and Lan (2017) was much less pronounced in strong-clan areas. By contrast, we show that the 1959-61 Great Famine was associated with higher mortality in areas with stronger clan ties. We argue that reconciling these two conflicting patterns requires that we take a broader view of how kinship groups interact with other governance institutions, in particular the role of kinship as a means of elite control.
32414.zh_abstract: 亲属关系是一种常见的制度，可能促进群体内部的协调与合作。然而，其收益（或缺乏收益）关键取决于更广泛的制度环境。我们研究宗族关系的普遍性如何影响社区应对中华人民共和国早期两个研究充分的历史事件，利用四个不同的县级宗族强度代理变量：公认的祠堂存在、族谱记录、水稻适宜性和地理纬度。我们表明，陈和兰（2017）记录的1955-56年集体化（强制农民以极低补偿交出牲畜）导致的牲畜损失，在宗族强大的地区要小得多。相比之下，我们表明，1959-61年大饥荒在宗族关系更强的地区与更高的死亡率相关。我们认为，调和这两种矛盾的模式需要我们对亲属群体如何与其他治理机构互动采取更广泛的视角，特别是宗族作为精英控制手段的作用。

32413.title: Measuring Information Frictions in Migration Decisions: A Revealed-Preference Approach
32413.zh_title: 衡量迁移决策中的信息摩擦：一种显示偏好方法
32413.authors: Charly Porcher, Eduardo Morales, Thomas Fujiwara
32413.abstract: We investigate the role of information frictions in migration. Using novel moment inequalities and data on internal migration in Brazil, we estimate worker preferences and migration costs while allowing for unobserved worker-specific information sets. We find that common estimation procedures overestimate migration costs and underestimate the importance of expected wages in migration decisions. Model specification tests indicate that workers often have limited information on location-specific wages. However, those living in regions with better internet access and larger populations have more precise wage information, and information precision decreases with distance. According to our estimated model, workers’ limited wage information plays a quantitatively important role in reducing migration flows and worker welfare, and limits the effect of policies that reduce migration costs.
32413.zh_abstract: 我们研究了信息摩擦在迁移中的作用。利用新颖的矩不等式和巴西国内迁移数据，我们在允许存在未观测到的工人特定信息集的情况下，估计了工人偏好和迁移成本。我们发现，常见的估计程序高估了迁移成本，并低估了预期工资在迁移决策中的重要性。模型设定检验表明，工人通常对特定地点的工资信息有限。然而，那些生活在互联网接入更好和人口更多地区的人拥有更精确的工资信息，且信息精确度随距离增加而降低。根据我们估计的模型，工人有限的工资信息在减少迁移流量和工人福利方面起着数量上重要的作用，并限制了降低迁移成本政策的效果。

32412.title: Alleviating Worker Shortages Through Targeted Subsidies: Evidence from Incentive Payments in Healthcare
32412.zh_title: 通过定向补贴缓解工人短缺：来自医疗保健激励支付的证据
32412.authors: Ashvin Gandhi, Andrew Olenski, Krista J. Ruffini, Karen Shen
32412.abstract: Worker shortages are common in many industries. This paper examines the effect of government subsidies to address these shortages in the context of a reform that tied Medicaid payments to nursing home staffing levels. We find that the reform substantially increased staffing, especially for facilities serving many Medicaid patients. Facilities responded primarily by hiring workers in lower-wage roles rather than increasing hours of incumbent or high-wage staff. This contrasts with null effects we estimate for a non-incentivized rate increase, suggesting that the incentive structure of government payments—rather than just the level—is key to boosting employment in sectors facing worker shortages.
32412.zh_abstract: 工人短缺在许多行业都很常见。本文以一项将医疗补助支付与养老院人员配备水平挂钩的改革为背景，考察了政府补贴解决这些短缺的效果。我们发现，该改革显著增加了人员配备，尤其是对于服务大量医疗补助患者的机构。机构主要通过雇佣较低工资岗位的工人来应对，而不是增加在职或高工资员工的工作时间。这与我们对非激励性费率增长估计的零效应形成对比，表明政府支付的激励结构——而不仅仅是水平——对于促进面临工人短缺行业的就业至关重要。

32411.title: How Do U.S. Firms Withstand Foreign Industrial Policies?
32411.zh_title: 美国企业如何抵御外国产业政策？
32411.authors: Xiao Cen, Vyacheslav Fos, Wei Jiang
32411.abstract: China’s industrial policies (“Five-Year Plans”) displace U.S. production/employment and heighten plant closures in the same industries as those targeted by the policies in China. The impact was not anticipated by the stock market, but U.S. companies in the "treated industries" suffer a valuation loss afterwards. Firms shift production to upstream or downstream industries benefiting from the boost, or offshore to government-endorsed industries in China. Such within-firm adjustments offset the direct impact. U.S. firms are better able to withstand foreign government interventions provided that they enjoy flexibility, including preexisting business toeholds in the "beneficiary" industries, financial access, and labor fluidity.
32411.zh_abstract: 中国的产业政策（“五年规划”）导致美国在与中国政策目标相同行业的生产和就业减少，并加剧了工厂关闭。股市并未预料到这一影响，但“受处理行业”的美国公司随后遭受估值损失。企业将生产转移到受益于政策提振的上游或下游行业，或离岸至中国政府认可的行业。这种企业内部调整抵消了直接影响。只要美国企业享有灵活性，包括在“受益”行业已有的业务立足点、融资渠道和劳动力流动性，它们就能更好地抵御外国政府干预。

32410.title: Gender and Electoral Incentives: Evidence from COVID-19 Response
32410.zh_title: 性别与选举激励：来自COVID-19应对的证据
32410.abstract: This paper provides new evidence on why men and women leaders make different choices. Exploiting Brazilian close elections, we show that female mayors responded differently to the COVID-19 crisis over the year 2020. Female mayors were less likely to close non-essential businesses early in the pandemic and female-led municipalities experienced higher mortality, while the reverse was true later on. We show that these findings can be rationalized by a simple political agency model in which politicians seek re-election and voters are gender biased. Consistent with this interpretation, the gender differences we find are driven exclusively by mayors facing re-election.
32410.zh_abstract: 本文提供了关于男女领导人为何做出不同选择的新证据。利用巴西的激烈选举，我们表明女性市长在2020年全年对COVID-19危机的应对方式不同。女性市长在大流行早期不太可能关闭非必要企业，女性领导的市镇死亡率更高，而后期情况则相反。我们表明，这些发现可以通过一个简单的政治代理模型合理化，其中政治家寻求连任，而选民存在性别偏见。与这一解释一致，我们发现的性别差异完全由面临连任的市长驱动。

32409.title: A Theory of Labor Markets with Inefficient Turnover
32409.zh_title: 低效流动的劳动力市场理论
32409.authors: Andrés Blanco, Andres Drenik, Christian Moser, Emilio Zaratiegui
32409.abstract: We develop a theory of labor markets with four features: search frictions, worker productivity shocks, wage rigidity, and two-sided lack of commitment. Inefficient job separations occur in the form of endogenous quits and layoffs that are unilaterally initiated whenever a worker's wage-to-productivity ratio moves outside an inaction region. We derive sufficient statistics for the labor market response to aggregate shocks based on the distribution of workers' wage-to-productivity ratios. These statistics depend on the incidence of inefficient job separations and are linked to readily available microdata on wage changes and worker flows between jobs.
32409.zh_abstract: 我们构建了一个包含四个特征的劳动力市场理论：搜索摩擦、工人生产率冲击、工资刚性以及双方缺乏承诺。低效的工作分离表现为内生性辞职和裁员，当工人的工资-生产率比率偏离无行动区间时，任何一方均可单方面发起。我们基于工人工资-生产率比率的分布，推导出劳动力市场对总体冲击响应的充分统计量。这些统计量取决于低效工作分离的发生率，并与工资变化和工人跨工作流动的现成微观数据相关联。

32408.title: The Gender Pay Gap: Micro Sources and Macro Consequences
32408.zh_title: 性别薪酬差距：微观来源与宏观后果
32408.abstract: Using linked employer-employee data from Brazil, we document a large gender pay gap due to women working at lower-paying employers with better nonpay attributes. To interpret these facts, we develop an equilibrium search model with endogenous firm pay, amenities, and hiring. We provide a constructive proof of identification of all model parameters. The estimated model suggests that amenities are important for both men and women, that compensating differentials explain half of the gender pay gap, and that there are significant output and welfare gains from eliminating gender differences. However, equal-treatment policies fail to achieve those gains.
32408.zh_abstract: 利用巴西的关联雇主-雇员数据，我们记录了因女性在薪酬较低但非薪酬属性更优的雇主处工作而导致的巨大性别薪酬差距。为解释这些事实，我们开发了一个包含内生企业薪酬、便利设施和招聘的均衡搜索模型。我们提供了所有模型参数识别的建设性证明。估计模型表明，便利设施对男性和女性都很重要，补偿性差异解释了性别薪酬差距的一半，消除性别差异可带来显著的产出和福利收益。然而，平等待遇政策未能实现这些收益。

32407.title: Birth Order in the Very Long-Run: Estimating Firstborn Premiums between 1850 and 1940
32407.zh_title: 极长时期内的出生顺序：估计1850年至1940年间的头胎优势
32407.authors: Angela Cools, Jared Grooms, Krzysztof Karbownik, Siobhan M. O'Keefe, Joseph Price, Anthony Wray
32407.abstract: The nineteenth-century American family experienced tremendous demographic, economic, and institutional changes. By using birth order effects as a proxy for family environment, and linked census data on men born between 1835 and 1910, we study how the family's role in human capital production evolved over this period. We find firstborn premiums for occupational outcomes, marriage, and fertility that are similar across census waves. Our results indicate that the returns to investments in the family environment were stable over a long period.
32407.zh_abstract: 19世纪的美国家庭经历了巨大的人口、经济和制度变迁。通过使用出生顺序效应作为家庭环境的代理变量，并利用1835年至1910年间出生男性的关联人口普查数据，我们研究了家庭在人力资本生产中的作用在这一时期的演变。我们发现，在职业结果、婚姻和生育方面存在头胎优势，且这些优势在不同普查波次中相似。我们的结果表明，家庭环境投资的回报在长期内保持稳定。

32406.title: On Eliciting Subjective Probability Distributions of Expectations
32406.zh_title: 关于引出主观概率分布预期的方法
32406.authors: Valerie R. Boctor, Olivier Coibion, Yuriy Gorodnichenko, Michael Weber
32406.abstract: Using data from a large survey of American households, we compare density forecasts elicited with bins- and scenarios-based questions. We show that inflation density forecasts are sensitive to the survey question designs used to elicit them. The within-person discrepancy is smaller, but still discernible, for unemployment expectations. The discrepancy in responses is systematically related to sociodemographic characteristics of respondents. The differences shed light on the significance of priming in bins-based inflation density forecasts.
32406.zh_abstract: 利用一项针对美国家庭的大规模调查数据，我们比较了基于分箱法和基于情景法的问题所引出的密度预测。我们表明，通胀密度预测对用于引出它们的调查问题设计很敏感。对于失业预期，个体内的差异较小但仍可察觉。回答中的差异与受访者的社会人口特征系统相关。这些差异揭示了分箱法通胀密度预测中启动效应的重要性。

32405.title: Empirical Tests of the Green Paradox for Climate Legislation
32405.zh_title: 气候立法绿色悖论的实证检验
32405.abstract: The Green Paradox posits that fossil fuel markets respond to changing expectations about climate legislation, which limits future consumption, by shifting consumption to the present through lower present-day prices. We demonstrate that oil futures responded negatively to daily changes in the prediction market's expectations that the Waxman-Markey bill — the US climate bill discussed in 2009-2010 — would pass. This effect is consistent across various maturities as the proposed legislation would reset the entire price and consumption path, unlike temporary supply or demand shocks that phase out over time. The bill’s passage would have increased current global oil consumption by 2-4%. Furthermore, a strengthening of climate policy, as measured by monthly variations in media salience regarding climate policy over the last four decades, and two court rulings signaling limited future fossil fuel use, were associated with negative abnormal oil future returns. Taken together, our findings confirm that restricting future fossil fuel use will accelerate current-day consumption.
32405.zh_abstract: 绿色悖论认为，化石燃料市场通过降低当前价格将消费转移到当前，以应对限制未来消费的气候立法预期的变化。我们证明，石油期货对预测市场中关于瓦克斯曼-马基法案（2009-2010年讨论的美国气候法案）通过可能性的每日变化做出了负面反应。这一效应在不同期限上一致，因为拟议的立法将重置整个价格和消费路径，这与随时间消退的暂时性供给或需求冲击不同。该法案的通过将使当前全球石油消费增加2-4%。此外，气候政策的加强——以过去四十年间媒体对气候政策关注度的月度变化以及两项限制未来化石燃料使用的法院裁决来衡量——与负面的异常石油期货收益相关。综合来看，我们的发现证实了限制未来化石燃料使用将加速当前消费。

32404.title: Social-Science Genomics: Progress, Challenges, and Future Directions
32404.zh_title: 社会科学基因组学：进展、挑战与未来方向
32404.authors: Daniel J. Benjamin, David Cesarini, Patrick Turley, Alexander Strudwick Young
32404.abstract: Rapid progress has been made in identifying links between human genetic variation and social and behavioral phenotypes. Applications in mainstream economics are beginning to emerge. This review aims to provide the background needed to bring the interested economist to the frontier of social-science genomics. Our review is structured around a theoretical framework that nests many of the key methods, concepts and tools found in the literature. We clarify key assumptions and appropriate interpretations. After reviewing several significant applications, we conclude by outlining future advances in genetics that will expand the scope of potential applications, and we discuss the ethical and communication challenges that arise in this area of research.
32404.zh_abstract: 在识别人类遗传变异与社会和行为表型之间的联系方面取得了快速进展。主流经济学的应用开始出现。本综述旨在提供必要的背景知识，使感兴趣的经济学家能够了解社会科学基因组学的前沿。我们的综述围绕一个理论框架展开，该框架涵盖了文献中的许多关键方法、概念和工具。我们阐明了关键假设和适当的解释。在回顾了几个重要应用之后，我们最后概述了遗传学的未来进展，这些进展将扩大潜在应用的范围，并讨论了该研究领域出现的伦理和沟通挑战。

32403.title: Building Non-Discriminatory Algorithms in Selected Data
32403.zh_title: 在选择性数据中构建非歧视性算法
32403.authors: David Arnold, Will S. Dobbie, Peter Hull
32403.abstract: We develop new quasi-experimental tools to understand algorithmic discrimination and build non-discriminatory algorithms when the outcome of interest is only selectively observed. These tools are applied in the context of pretrial bail decisions, where conventional algorithmic predictions are generated using only the misconduct outcomes of released defendants. We first show that algorithmic discrimination arises in such settings when the available algorithmic inputs are systematically different for white and Black defendants with the same objective misconduct potential. We then show how algorithmic discrimination can be eliminated by measuring and purging these conditional input disparities. Leveraging the quasi-random assignment of bail judges in New York City, we find that our new algorithms not only eliminate algorithmic discrimination but also generate more accurate predictions by correcting for the selective observability of misconduct outcomes.
32403.zh_abstract: 我们开发了新的准实验工具，以理解算法歧视，并在感兴趣的结果仅被选择性观测时构建非歧视性算法。这些工具应用于审前保释决策的背景，其中传统的算法预测仅使用被释放被告的不当行为结果生成。我们首先表明，当可用的算法输入对于具有相同客观不当行为潜力的白人和黑人被告系统性地不同时，算法歧视就会出现。然后，我们展示了如何通过测量和消除这些条件输入差异来消除算法歧视。利用纽约市保释法官的准随机分配，我们发现我们的新算法不仅消除了算法歧视，而且通过纠正不当行为结果的可选择性观测性，生成了更准确的预测。

32402.title: Business as Usual: Bank Net Zero Commitments, Lending, and Engagement
32402.zh_title: 一切照旧：银行净零承诺、贷款与参与
32402.authors: Parinitha R. Sastry, Emil Verner, David Marques Ibanez
32402.abstract: We use administrative credit registry data from Europe to study the impact of voluntary lender net zero commitments. We have two sets of findings. First, we find no evidence of lender divestment. Net zero banks neither reduce credit supply to the sectors they target for decarbonization nor do they increase financing for renewables projects. Second, we find no evidence of reduced financed emissions through engagement. Borrowers of net zero banks are not more likely to set decarbonization targets or reduce their verified emissions. Our estimates rule out even moderate-sized effects. These results highlight the limits of voluntary commitments for decarbonization.
32402.zh_abstract: 我们利用欧洲的行政信贷登记数据来研究自愿性贷款机构净零承诺的影响。我们有两组发现。首先，我们没有发现贷款机构撤资的证据。净零银行既没有减少对其脱碳目标行业的信贷供给，也没有增加对可再生能源项目的融资。其次，我们没有发现通过参与减少融资排放的证据。净零银行的借款人并不更有可能设定脱碳目标或减少其经核实的排放。我们的估计排除了即使是中等规模的影响。这些结果凸显了自愿性脱碳承诺的局限性。

32401.title: The Streetlight Effect in Data-Driven Exploration
32401.zh_title: 数据驱动探索中的路灯效应
32401.authors: Johannes Hoelzemann, Gustavo Manso, Abhishek Nagaraj, Matteo Tranchero
32401.abstract: We study exploration under uncertainty and show how access to data on past attempts can paradoxically hinder breakthrough discovery. We develop a model of the “streetlight effect” demonstrating that when data highlights attractive but ultimately suboptimal projects, it can narrow exploration and suppress innovation. In a laboratory experiment, we find that revealing the value of an enticing project lowers payoffs and reduces breakthrough discoveries. This drop stems from increased free-riding behavior, which crowds out the generation of new data. We validate our theory in the context of scientific research into the genetic origins of human diseases. To identify the causal impact of past data, we use an instrumental variable that leverages exogenous genetic overlaps between humans and laboratory mice, which reduces research costs for specific genes and leads to prioritized data collection about them. We find that diseases with early evidence of promising genetic targets are 16 percentage points less likely to yield breakthroughs than those where early efforts failed. While competition attenuates the streetlight effect, it does not eliminate it. Our paper provides the first systematic analysis of this phenomenon, outlining the conditions under which data leads agents to look under the lamppost rather than engage in socially beneficial exploration.
32401.zh_abstract: 我们研究了不确定性下的探索行为，并展示了获取过去尝试的数据如何可能矛盾地阻碍突破性发现。我们构建了一个“路灯效应”模型，证明当数据突出显示有吸引力但最终并非最优的项目时，它会缩小探索范围并抑制创新。在一项实验室实验中，我们发现揭示一个诱人项目的价值会降低收益并减少突破性发现。这种下降源于搭便车行为的增加，从而挤出了新数据的生成。我们在人类疾病遗传起源的科学研究背景下验证了我们的理论。为了识别过去数据的因果影响，我们使用了一个工具变量，该变量利用了人类与实验室小鼠之间的外生遗传重叠，这降低了特定基因的研究成本，并导致对这些基因的数据收集优先化。我们发现，与早期努力失败的疾病相比，早期有希望遗传靶点证据的疾病取得突破的可能性低16个百分点。虽然竞争减弱了路灯效应，但并未消除它。我们的论文首次对这一现象进行了系统分析，概述了数据导致主体在路灯下寻找而非进行对社会有益的探索的条件。

32400.title: Immigrant Entrepreneurship: New Estimates and a Research Agenda
32400.zh_title: 移民创业：新估计与研究议程
32400.authors: Saheel A. Chodavadia, Sari Pekkala Kerr, William R. Kerr, Louis J. Maiden
32400.abstract: Immigrants contribute disproportionately to entrepreneurship in many countries, accounting for a quarter of new employer businesses in the US. We review recent research on the measurement of immigrant entrepreneurship, the traits of immigrant founders, their economic impact, and policy levers. We provide updated statistics on the share of US entrepreneurs who are immigrants. We utilize the Annual Business Survey to quantify the greater rates of patenting and innovation in immigrant-founded firms. This higher propensity towards innovation is only partly explained by differences in education levels and fields of study. We conclude with avenues for future research.
32400.zh_abstract: 移民在许多国家对创业的贡献不成比例，在美国占新雇主企业的四分之一。我们回顾了近期关于移民创业衡量、移民创始人特征、其经济影响以及政策杠杆的研究。我们提供了美国创业者中移民比例的最新统计数据。我们利用年度商业调查来量化移民创办企业中更高的专利和创新能力。这种更高的创新倾向仅部分由教育水平和研究领域的差异解释。最后，我们提出了未来研究的途径。
32400.meta: Programs：LS, PR；JEL：F22, F6, J15, J61, L26, M13, O15, O3, R23

32454.title: Exorbitant Privilege: A Safe-Asset View
32454.zh_title: 过高特权：安全资产视角
32454.abstract: I propose a model of the reserve currency paradigm that centers on liquidity demand for safe assets. In global recessions, the demand for U.S. safe assets increases and raises their convenience yields, giving rise to stronger dollar and countercyclical seigniorage revenues. The seigniorage revenues raise the U.S. wealth and consumption shares in recessions, despite the U.S. suffering portfolio losses from external positions. This asset demand channel also connects exchange rates to bond holdings, which provides new perspectives on exchange rate disconnect and the exchange rate-capital flow relationship. Under this safe-asset view, exorbitant privilege does not require exorbitant duty.
32454.zh_abstract: 我提出了一个以安全资产流动性需求为核心的储备货币范式模型。在全球衰退期间，对美国安全资产的需求增加，提高了其便利收益率，导致美元走强和反周期的铸币税收入。尽管美国因外部头寸遭受投资组合损失，但铸币税收入提高了美国在衰退期间的财富和消费份额。这种资产需求渠道还将汇率与债券持有量联系起来，为汇率脱节和汇率-资本流动关系提供了新视角。在这种安全资产视角下，过高特权并不要求过高义务。

32453.title: Dollar Asset Holdings and Hedging Around the Globe
32453.zh_title: 全球范围内的美元资产持有与对冲
32453.abstract: We collect and analyze a large set of industry- and company-level filings from global institutional investors to provide the first comprehensive estimates of foreign investors’ U.S. dollar (USD) security holdings and currency hedging practices. We document that foreign investors’ USD holdings expanded six-fold over two decades, driven in large part by increased portfolio allocations. Following the 2007-09 financial crisis, mutual funds, insurance companies, and pension funds raised their USD hedge ratios by 15 percentage points, with total FX hedging demand reaching $\$2$ trillion by 2019. USD hedging demand varies significantly across currency areas and banking systems. Using a mean-variance framework, we benchmark investors’ currency hedging practices and identify expected FX returns as a key driver of hedging decisions, beyond considerations of variance minimization. Finally, we show a strong correlation between hedging activity and the cross-section of CIP deviations, underscoring the role of constrained financial intermediaries in currency hedging markets.
32453.zh_abstract: 我们收集并分析了来自全球机构投资者的大量行业和公司层面文件，首次提供了外国投资者美元证券持有和货币对冲实践的全面估计。我们记录到，外国投资者的美元持有量在二十年间增长了六倍，这在很大程度上是由投资组合配置增加驱动的。在2007-09年金融危机之后，共同基金、保险公司和养老基金将其美元对冲比率提高了15个百分点，到2019年，外汇对冲总需求达到2万亿美元。美元对冲需求在不同货币区和银行体系之间存在显著差异。使用均值-方差框架，我们以投资者的货币对冲实践为基准，并确定预期外汇回报是对冲决策的关键驱动因素，而不仅仅是方差最小化的考虑。最后，我们展示了对冲活动与货币基差交易偏差横截面之间的强相关性，强调了受约束的金融中介在货币对冲市场中的作用。

32452.title: Demand-side and Supply-side Constraints in the Market for Financial Advice
32452.zh_title: 金融咨询市场中的需求侧和供给侧约束
32452.abstract: In this review, we argue that access to financial advice and the quality of this advice is shaped by a broad array of demand-side and supply-side constraints. While the literature has predominantly focused on conflicts of interest between advisors and clients, we highlight that the transaction costs of providing advice, mistaken beliefs on the demand side or supply side, and other factors can have equally detrimental effects on the quality and access to advice. Moreover, these factors affect how researchers should assess the impact of financial advice across heterogeneous groups of households. While households with low levels of financial literacy are more likely to benefit from advice—potentially including conflicted advice—they are also the least likely to detect misconduct, and perhaps the least likely to understand the value of paying for advice. Regulators should consider not only how regulation changes the quality of advice, but also the fraction of households who are able to receive it and how different groups would have invested without any advice. Financial innovation has the potential to provide customized advice at low cost, but also to embed conflicts of interest in algorithms that are opaque to households and regulators.
32452.zh_abstract: 在这篇综述中，我们认为，获得金融咨询的机会以及咨询的质量受到一系列需求侧和供给侧约束的影响。虽然文献主要关注顾问与客户之间的利益冲突，但我们强调，提供咨询的交易成本、需求侧或供给侧的误解以及其他因素，可能对咨询质量和获取机会产生同样有害的影响。此外，这些因素影响了研究人员应如何评估金融咨询对不同异质性家庭群体的影响。虽然金融素养水平低的家庭更有可能从咨询中受益——可能包括存在利益冲突的咨询——但他们也是最不可能发现不当行为的群体，或许也是最不了解付费咨询价值的群体。监管机构不仅应考虑监管如何改变咨询质量，还应考虑能够获得咨询的家庭比例，以及不同群体在没有咨询的情况下会如何投资。金融创新有可能以低成本提供定制化咨询，但也可能将利益冲突嵌入对家庭和监管机构不透明的算法中。

32451.title: Trade Wars and the Optimal Design of Monetary Rules
32451.zh_title: 贸易战与货币政策规则的最优设计
32451.authors: Stéphane Auray, Michael B. Devereux, Aurélien Eyquem
32451.abstract: Monetary rules may have a large effect on the outcome of trade wars if central banks target the CPI inflation rate or more generally changes in the relative price of traded goods. We lay out a two-country open-economy model with sticky prices where countries engage in trade wars. In the presence of monopoly pricing markups, we show that the final level of tariffs and welfare losses from trade wars critically depend on the design of monetary policy. If central banks adopt a fixed nominal exchange rate or even better target the CPI inflation rate, trade wars are much less intense than those under PPI inflation targeting. We further show that an optimally delegated monetary rule that internalizes the formation of non-cooperative trade policy can actually completely eliminate a trade war, and even act to partly offset the welfare cost of monopoly markups.
32451.zh_abstract: 如果中央银行以消费者价格指数通胀率或更一般地以贸易品相对价格的变化为目标，货币政策规则可能对贸易战的结果产生重大影响。我们构建了一个具有粘性价格的两国开放经济模型，其中各国参与贸易战。在存在垄断定价加成的情况下，我们表明，关税的最终水平和贸易战造成的福利损失关键取决于货币政策的设计。如果中央银行采用固定名义汇率，或者更好的是以消费者价格指数通胀率为目标，那么贸易战的激烈程度远低于以生产者价格指数通胀为目标的情况。我们进一步表明，一个内化了非合作贸易政策形成的最优委托货币政策规则，实际上可以完全消除贸易战，甚至部分抵消垄断加成的福利成本。

32450.title: The Macroeconomic Impact of Climate Change: Global vs. Local Temperature
32450.zh_title: 气候变化的宏观经济影响：全球温度与局部温度
32450.abstract: This paper estimates that the macroeconomic damages from climate change are an order of magnitude larger than previously thought. Exploiting natural global temperature variability, we find that 1°C warming reduces world GDP by over 20% in the long run. Global temperature correlates strongly with extreme climatic events, unlike country-level temperature used in previous work, explaining our larger estimate. We use this evidence to estimate damage functions in a neoclassical growth model. Business-as-usual warming implies a present welfare loss of more than 30%, and a Social Cost of Carbon in excess of $\$1,200$ per ton. These impacts suggest that unilateral decarbonization policy is cost-effective for large countries such as the United States.
32450.zh_abstract: 本文估计气候变化造成的宏观经济损害比先前认为的大一个数量级。利用全球自然温度变异性，我们发现长期内升温1°C会使世界GDP减少超过20%。全球温度与极端气候事件高度相关，这与先前研究中使用的国家层面温度不同，从而解释了我们的更大估计值。我们利用这一证据在新古典增长模型中估计损害函数。照常升温情景意味着当前福利损失超过30%，且碳的社会成本超过每吨1200美元。这些影响表明，对于美国等大国而言，单边脱碳政策具有成本效益。
32450.meta: Programs：EEE, EFG, ITI；JEL：E01, E23, F18, O44, Q54, Q56

32449.title: Monetary Transmission Through Bank Securities Portfolios
32449.zh_title: 通过银行证券组合的货币政策传导
32449.authors: Daniel Greenwald, John Krainer, Pascal Paul
32449.abstract: We study the transmission of monetary policy through bank securities portfolios using granular supervisory data on U.S. bank securities, hedging positions, and corporate credit. Banks that experienced larger losses on their securities during the 2022-2023 monetary tightening cycle extended less credit to firms. This spillover effect was stronger for available-for-sale securities, unhedged securities, and banks that must include unrealized gains and losses in their regulatory capital. A structural model, disciplined by our cross-sectional regression estimates, shows that interest rate transmission is stronger the more banks are required to adjust their regulatory capital for unrealized value changes of securities.
32449.zh_abstract: 我们利用美国银行证券、对冲头寸和企业信贷的精细监管数据，研究货币政策通过银行证券组合的传导。在2022-2023年货币紧缩周期中，证券损失较大的银行向企业提供的信贷较少。这种溢出效应对于可供出售证券、未对冲证券以及必须将未实现损益纳入监管资本的银行更为强烈。一个由我们的横截面回归估计约束的结构模型表明，银行越需要根据证券未实现价值变动调整监管资本，利率传导就越强。
32449.meta: Programs：CF, ME；JEL：E32, E43, E44, E51, E52, E60, G21, G32

32448.title: Melitz Meets Lewis: The Impacts of Roads on Structural Transformation and Businesses
32448.zh_title: Melitz遇见Lewis：道路对结构转型和企业的影响
32448.authors: Joseph P. Kaboski, Jianyu Lu, Wei Qian, Lixia Ren
32448.abstract: This paper examines the impact of roads on structural transformation and business composition theoretically and empirically. We develop a two-sector model of regional trade with endogenous firm entry that highlights two opposing forces. \\textit{Ceteris paribus} lower trade costs in non-agriculture lead to fewer firms, but cheaper agricultural imports releases labor from local agricultural production leading to more firms. Using major highway programs in India and China, we find results broadly consistent with the theory, with declines in the number of businesses where structural transformation is weak, and increases where it is strong.
32448.zh_abstract: 本文从理论和实证上考察道路对结构转型和企业构成的影响。我们构建了一个包含内生企业进入的两部门区域贸易模型，强调两种相反的力量。在其他条件相同的情况下，非农业部门较低的贸易成本导致企业数量减少，但更便宜的农产品进口释放了当地农业生产的劳动力，从而带来更多企业。利用印度和中国的主要高速公路项目，我们发现结果与理论基本一致：在结构转型较弱的地区企业数量下降，而在结构转型较强的地区企业数量增加。

32447.title: Optimal Mortgage Refinancing with Inattention
32447.zh_title: 存在注意力不足时的最优抵押贷款再融资
32447.authors: David W. Berger, Konstantin Milbradt, Fabrice Tourre, Joseph S. Vavra
32447.abstract: We build a model of optimal fixed-rate mortgage refinancing with fixed costs and inattention and derive a new sufficient statistic that can be used to measure inattention frictions from simple moments of the rate gap distribution. In the model, borrowers pay attention to rates sporadically so they often fail to refinance even when it is profitable. When paying attention, borrowers optimally choose to refinance earlier than under a perfect attention benchmark. Our model can rationalize almost all errors of “omission” (refinancing too slowly) and a large fraction of the errors of “commission” (refinancing too quickly) previously documented in the data.
32447.zh_abstract: 我们构建了一个存在固定成本和注意力不足的最优固定利率抵押贷款再融资模型，并推导出一个新的充分统计量，可用于从利率缺口分布的简单矩中衡量注意力不足摩擦。在该模型中，借款人偶尔关注利率，因此即使再融资有利可图，他们也常常未能进行再融资。当关注利率时，借款人最优选择比完全注意力基准下更早进行再融资。我们的模型可以解释数据中先前记录的大部分“不作为”错误（再融资过慢）和很大一部分“作为”错误（再融资过快）。
32447.meta: Programs：AP, CF, ME；JEL：E4, G21, G4, G5, R2

32445.title: The Economics of Infertility: Evidence from Reproductive Medicine
32445.zh_title: 不孕不育经济学：来自生殖医学的证据
32445.authors: Sarah Bögl, Jasmin Moshfegh, Petra Persson, Maria Polyakova
32445.abstract: As the share of births that rely on assisted reproductive technologies (ART) keeps growing, policies around infertility treatments remain ridden with controversy. We use population-wide Swedish administrative data with uniquely detailed information on individual-level use of ARTs, combined with quasi-experimental empirical methods, to characterize the rate of infertility burden, its private and public costs, and the role of insurance coverage in alleviating infertility. We estimate that one in eight women will experience primary infertility – the inability to have any child at all – over her fertile years. Our analysis reveals that persistent infertility causes a long-run deterioration of mental health and couple stability, with no long-run “protective” effects (of having no child) on earnings. Insurance coverage plays a central role in driving the demand for expensive infertility treatments (IVF). The rate of IVF initiations drops by half when treatment is not covered by health insurance. Our estimates imply that couples are willing to pay at most 33% of their annual disposable income for a course of IVF treatment that gives an about 40% chance of having a child. The response to insurance coverage is more pronounced at the lower end of the income distribution. We show that, as a result, coverage of infertility treatments determines both the total number of additional children as well as their allocation across the socio-economic spectrum.
32445.zh_abstract: 随着依赖辅助生殖技术（ART）出生的婴儿比例持续增长，围绕不孕不育治疗的政策仍充满争议。我们利用瑞典全人口行政数据，其中包含个人层面ART使用的独特详细信息，结合准实验实证方法，来刻画不孕不育负担率、其私人和公共成本，以及保险覆盖在缓解不孕不育中的作用。我们估计，每八名女性中就有一人在育龄期内经历原发性不孕不育——即完全无法生育孩子。我们的分析显示，持续性不孕不育会导致心理健康和伴侣关系的长期恶化，而在收入方面没有（因无子女而产生的）长期“保护”效应。保险覆盖在推动昂贵的不孕不育治疗（IVF）需求中起着核心作用。当治疗不被健康保险覆盖时，IVF启动率下降一半。我们的估计表明，夫妇愿意为一个约40%概率生育孩子的IVF疗程支付最多其年可支配收入的33%。对保险覆盖的反应在收入分布的低端更为明显。我们表明，因此，不孕不育治疗的覆盖既决定了额外子女的总数，也决定了他们在社会经济谱系中的分配。
32445.meta: Programs：CH, EH, LS, PE；JEL：H0, I0, J0

32444.title: Do E-Cigarette Retail Licensure Laws Reduce Tobacco Use?
32444.zh_title: 电子烟零售许可法能否减少烟草使用？
32444.authors: Charles J. Courtemanche, Yang Liang, Johanna Catherine Maclean, Caterina Muratori, Joseph J. Sabia
32444.abstract: E-cigarette licensure laws (ELLs) require retailers to obtain a state license to sell e-cigarettes over the counter. This study is the first to comprehensively explore the effect of ELL adoption on youth and adult tobacco product use. Using data from the State Youth Risk Behavior Survey (YRBS) and a difference-in-differences approach, we find no evidence that ELL adoption reduces overall youth ENDS use. The precision of our estimates allows us to rule out, with 95 percent confidence, ELL-induced prior-month youth ENDS use declines of more than 3.4 percent. The pattern of null findings persists when we examine ELLs that impose (1) higher penalties for retailer non-compliance, (2) higher renewable licensure fees, and (3) criminal as compared to civil penalties. However, we do uncover evidence that adoption of ELLs with higher penalties associated with a modest reduction in ENDS use among Black teens. We conclude that ELLs have only limited success in curbing access to ENDS.
32444.zh_abstract: 电子烟许可法（ELLs）要求零售商获得州许可证才能非处方销售电子烟。本研究首次全面探讨ELL采纳对青少年和成人烟草产品使用的影响。利用州青少年风险行为调查（YRBS）数据和双重差分方法，我们没有发现ELL采纳能减少青少年整体ENDS使用的证据。我们估计的精度允许我们在95%置信水平上排除ELL导致青少年过去一个月ENDS使用下降超过3.4%的可能性。当我们考察（1）对零售商违规施加更高处罚、（2）更高续期许可费以及（3）刑事处罚而非民事处罚的ELL时，零结果模式依然存在。然而，我们确实发现证据表明，采纳具有更高处罚的ELL与黑人青少年ENDS使用的适度减少相关。我们得出结论，ELL在遏制ENDS获取方面仅取得有限成功。

32443.title: Employer 401(k) Matches for Student Debt Repayment: Killing Two Birds with One Stone?
32443.zh_title: 雇主对学生贷款还款的401(k)匹配：一石二鸟？
32443.authors: Vanya Horneff, Raimond Maurer, Olivia S. Mitchell
32443.abstract: Almost 50 million Americans are burdened by the need to repay almost $\$2$ trillion in student loan debt, while at the same time having to save for retirement. This article analyzes the potential impact of the 2022 SECURE 2.0 Act reform which permits employers to match contributions for student loan repayments, in 401(k) plans. Our calibrated lifecycle model measures the impact of this reform on heterogeneous households’ financial behavior and welfare. We show that, post-reform, employees will repay more loan debt but reduce own retirement plan contributions, offset by higher employer-matching contributions that take loan repayments into account.
32443.zh_abstract: 近5000万美国人背负着近2万亿美元的学生贷款债务需要偿还，同时还要为退休储蓄。本文分析了2022年《SECURE 2.0法案》改革的潜在影响，该改革允许雇主在401(k)计划中为学生贷款还款提供匹配缴款。我们校准的生命周期模型衡量了这项改革对异质性家庭财务行为和福利的影响。我们表明，改革后，员工将偿还更多贷款债务，但会减少自己的退休计划缴款，而这部分被考虑贷款还款的更高雇主匹配缴款所抵消。

32442.title: Half Empty and Half Full? Women in Economics and the Rise in Gender-Related Research
32442.zh_title: 半空半满？经济学中的女性与性别相关研究的兴起
32442.authors: Francisca M. Antman, Kirk B. Doran, Xuechao Qian, Bruce A. Weinberg
32442.abstract: Using the EconLit dissertation database and large-scale algorithmic methods that identify author demographics from names, we investigate the connection between the gender of economics dissertators and dissertation topics. Despite stagnation in the share of women among economics Ph.D.s in recent years, there has been a remarkable rise in gender-related dissertations in economics over time and in many sub-fields. Women economists are significantly more likely to write gender-related dissertations and bring gender-related topics into a wide range of fields within economics. Men in economics have also substantially increased their interest in gender-related topics.
32442.zh_abstract: 利用EconLit论文数据库和通过姓名识别作者人口统计特征的大规模算法方法，我们调查了经济学博士论文作者的性别与论文主题之间的联系。尽管近年来经济学博士中女性比例停滞不前，但经济学中性别相关论文的数量随时间推移以及在许多子领域中显著增加。女性经济学家更有可能撰写性别相关论文，并将性别相关主题引入经济学内的广泛领域。经济学中的男性对性别相关主题的兴趣也大幅增加。
32442.meta: Programs：ED, LS, PR；JEL：A23, I23, J16, O30

32441.title: The Disenrollment and Labor Supply Effects of SNAP Work Requirements
32441.zh_title: SNAP工作要求对退出参保和劳动供给的影响
32441.authors: Jason B. Cook, Chloe N. East
32441.abstract: Amid growing efforts to expand work requirements in U.S. transfer programs, new proposals target parents of young children, despite limited evidence of efficacy for this population. We provide the first modern causal estimates of the Supplemental Nutrition Assistance Program’s (SNAP) work requirements on parents using linked administrative data. Parents do not increase their work, but are much less likely to receive SNAP, undermining SNAP’s ability to reach the neediest households. The structure of these policies enables us to tease apart mechanisms and we conclude that administrative burdens imposed by work requirements are the key driver of this disenrollment effect.
32441.zh_abstract: 在美国转移支付项目中扩大工作要求的努力日益增加，新的提案针对年幼子女的父母，尽管针对这一人群的有效性证据有限。我们利用关联行政数据，首次提供了补充营养援助计划（SNAP）工作要求对父母影响的现代因果估计。父母并未增加工作，但获得SNAP的可能性大幅降低，这削弱了SNAP覆盖最贫困家庭的能力。这些政策的结构使我们能够梳理出机制，我们得出结论：工作要求带来的行政负担是这种退出参保效应的关键驱动因素。

32440.title: Losing to Gain: Revenue Shortfalls and Fiscal Capacity in Brazil
32440.zh_title: 失之东隅，收之桑榆：巴西的收入短缺与财政能力
32440.authors: Claudio Ferraz, Dirk Foremny, Juan Francisco Santini
32440.abstract: This paper investigates how shocks to non-tax revenues impact tax collection in Brazilian municipalities, exploiting an exogenous shift in intergovernmental transfers driven by population updates. Our analysis reveals asymmetric effects of shocks: revenue gains lead to increased spending without tax reductions, while losses in transfers prompt investments in fiscal capacity and boost tax revenues. Enhancing fiscal capacity entails adjusting tax bureaucrat payments, improving property registries, and cracking down on delinquency, with heterogeneous responses based on political competition and the educational levels of local leaders and the bureaucracy. These findings emphasize the importance of rules that reduce the reliance on non-tax revenues and promote effective tax collection.
32440.zh_abstract: 本文研究了非税收收入冲击如何影响巴西市镇的税收征收，利用人口更新驱动的政府间转移支付外生变化。我们的分析揭示了冲击的非对称效应：收入增加导致支出上升，但税收并未减少；而转移支付损失则促使财政能力投资，并提高税收收入。增强财政能力包括调整税务官僚薪酬、改善财产登记以及打击拖欠行为，其反应因政治竞争以及地方领导人和官僚的教育水平而异。这些发现强调了减少对非税收收入依赖并促进有效税收征收的规则的重要性。
32440.meta: Programs：DEV, PE, POL；JEL：H71, H72, H83, P11

32439.title: Pricing Innovation in Surgical Care Markets
32439.zh_title: 外科护理市场中的创新定价
32439.authors: Alice Chen, Seth M. Freedman, Elizabeth L. Munnich, Michael R. Richards
32439.abstract: Technological innovation in medical services can improve health, but its ability to reach patients often depends on price signals for downstream providers, which can also be discordant across production inputs. We examine such a context when Medicare sharply revises facility fees—while holding physician fees constant—for advanced surgical care performed within certain outpatient settings. Industry-wide output for impacted cases increases via market expansion, and indirectly affected physicians devote more labor supply to these cases by sacrificing other outpatient and inpatient surgical volumes. Government price setting for healthcare facilities spills over onto physicians––impacting their technology utilization and time allocations.
32439.zh_abstract: 医疗服务的技术创新可以改善健康，但其惠及患者的能力往往取决于下游提供者的价格信号，而这些信号在生产投入之间也可能不一致。我们研究了当Medicare大幅修订某些门诊环境下高级外科护理的设施费用（同时保持医生费用不变）时的此类情境。受影响病例的行业产出通过市场扩张而增加，而间接受影响的医生通过牺牲其他门诊和住院手术量，将更多劳动供给投入这些病例。政府对医疗设施的价格设定会溢出到医生身上，影响他们的技术利用和时间分配。
32439.meta: Programs：EH；JEL：I11, I13, I18, L25, L84, L88

32438.title: To Find Relative Earnings Gains After the China Shock, Look Outside Manufacturing and Upstream
32438.zh_title: 寻找中国冲击后的相对收入增长：关注制造业之外和上游领域
32438.authors: Justin R. Pierce, Peter K. Schott, Cristina Tello-Trillo
32438.abstract: We examine US workers' employment and earnings before and after trade liberalization with China. Among workers initially employed in manufacturing, we find substantial and persistent declines in both outcomes, with indirect exposure via input-output linkages exacerbating the negative effects of direct exposure. For workers initially employed outside manufacturing, however, we find that the positive impact of greater upstream exposure via inputs more than offsets the adverse impacts of own- and downstream exposure, inducing relative earnings gains. We also find that spatial exposure is more influential than industry exposure.
32438.zh_abstract: 我们考察了中美贸易自由化前后美国工人的就业和收入。在最初受雇于制造业的工人中，我们发现这两个结果都出现了显著且持续的下降，通过投入产出关联的间接暴露加剧了直接暴露的负面影响。然而，对于最初受雇于制造业以外的工人，我们发现更大的上游投入暴露的正面影响足以抵消自身和下游暴露的不利影响，从而带来相对收入增长。我们还发现，空间暴露比行业暴露更具影响力。

32437.title: Demographic Diversity and Economic Research: Fields of Specialization and Research on Race, Ethnicity, and Inequality
32437.zh_title: 人口多样性与经济研究：专业领域及关于种族、民族与不平等的研究
32437.authors: Francisca M. Antman, Kirk B. Doran, Xuechao Qian, Bruce A. Weinberg
32437.abstract: Using dissertation research topics found in the EconLit database and large-scale algorithmic methods that identify author demographics based on names, we explore the link between race and ethnicity and fields of economic research. We find that underrepresented racial and ethnic minority (URM) researchers are more likely to write dissertations in some unexpected sub-fields of economics, but limited evidence that they are more likely to write dissertations on racial topics once we include basic controls. These descriptive results may be due to limitations in the data, intrinsic motivations, or external constraints.
32437.zh_abstract: 利用EconLit数据库中的博士论文研究主题，以及基于姓名识别作者人口特征的大规模算法方法，我们探讨了种族和民族与经济研究领域之间的联系。我们发现，代表性不足的种族和民族少数群体（URM）研究人员更有可能在一些意想不到的经济学子领域撰写博士论文，但一旦加入基本控制变量，他们更有可能撰写关于种族主题论文的证据有限。这些描述性结果可能源于数据限制、内在动机或外部约束。
32437.meta: Programs：ED, LS, PR；JEL：A13, A23, I23, J15, O30

32436.title: What do Financial Markets say about the Exchange Rate?
32436.zh_title: 金融市场对汇率有何看法？
32436.authors: Mikhail Chernov, Valentin Haddad, Oleg Itskhoki
32436.abstract: We develop a general framework characterizing when exchange rates connect or disconnect from fundamentals across different financial market structures. International portfolio risk sharing governs how tightly exchange rates track households’ stochastic discount factors. We introduce a tractable sufficient statistic for connect: the prevalence of globally-traded risks, the component of asset risks that households in both countries can trade through available financial instruments. When globally-traded risks dominate, exchange rate puzzles persist regardless of market structure. In turn, disconnect requires neither extreme segmentation nor thin financial markets; it emerges whenever globally-traded risks are limited. Empirically, cross-country asset return correlations are weak, implying modest amount of globally-traded risks and pervasive disconnect in intermediated market structures. When correlations increase, as observed post-2008 or during high-risk episodes, exchange rates track fundamentals more closely.
32436.zh_abstract: 我们建立了一个通用框架，描述在不同金融市场结构下，汇率何时与基本面连接或脱钩。国际投资组合风险分担决定了汇率追踪家庭随机贴现因子的紧密程度。我们引入了一个易于处理的连接充分统计量：全球交易风险的存在程度，即两国家庭通过可用金融工具可以交易的资产风险组成部分。当全球交易风险占主导时，无论市场结构如何，汇率谜题都会持续存在。反过来，脱钩既不需要极端分割，也不需要薄弱的金融市场；只要全球交易风险有限，脱钩就会出现。实证上，跨国资产回报相关性较弱，意味着全球交易风险程度适中，且在中间市场结构中普遍存在脱钩。当相关性增加时（如2008年后或高风险时期所见），汇率更紧密地追踪基本面。
32436.meta: Programs：AP, EFG, IFM, ME；JEL：E44, F31, G15

32435.title: Demand For E-Cigarettes Based On Nicotine Strength: Evidence From Retail Sales
32435.zh_title: 基于尼古丁浓度的电子烟需求：来自零售销售的证据
32435.authors: Megan C. Diaz, Adrian Bertrand, Tatum McKay, Barbara A. Schillo, Bushraa S. Khatib, John A. Tauras
32435.abstract: Using NielsenIQ Retail Scanner data, we estimate demand equations for e-cigarettes by nicotine concentration. Overall, the models show that the price elasticities of demand range from -2.117 to -1.494. In a rapidly evolving e-cigarette market, demand for e-cigarettes varies considerably by nicotine strength. High-nicotine products, which have many close substitutes, are found to be more responsive to changes in price. Demand for low-nicotine products, with few close substitutes, are found to be less responsive to changes in price. Our findings also suggest that e-cigarettes with the lowest and highest nicotine concentrations may be economic complements, suggesting concurrent use. Unlike available evidence on cross-tax elasticities of demand, we find no evidence of an economic relationship between traditional cigarettes and e-cigarettes when broken down by nicotine strength concentration.
32435.zh_abstract: 利用NielsenIQ零售扫描数据，我们按尼古丁浓度估算了电子烟的需求方程。总体而言，模型显示需求价格弹性范围在-2.117至-1.494之间。在快速演变的电子烟市场中，电子烟的需求因尼古丁强度而有显著差异。我们发现，具有许多近似替代品的高尼古丁产品对价格变化更为敏感。而具有较少近似替代品的低尼古丁产品对价格变化的敏感度较低。我们的发现还表明，最低和最高尼古丁浓度的电子烟可能是经济互补品，暗示同时使用。与现有关于需求交叉税收弹性的证据不同，我们发现按尼古丁强度浓度细分时，传统卷烟与电子烟之间不存在经济关系的证据。

32434.title: Causal Effects in Matching Mechanisms with Strategically Reported Preferences
32434.zh_title: 具有策略性报告偏好的匹配机制中的因果效应
32434.authors: Marinho Bertanha, Margaux Luflade, Ismael Mourifié
32434.abstract: A growing number of central authorities use assignment mechanisms to allocate students to schools in a way that reflects student preferences and school priorities. However, most real-world mechanisms incentivize students to strategically misreport their preferences. In this paper, we provide an approach for identifying the causal effects of school assignment on future outcomes that accounts for strategic misreporting. Misreporting may invalidate existing point-identification approaches, and we derive sharp bounds for causal effects that are robust to strategic behavior. Our approach applies to any mechanism as long as there exist placement scores and cutoffs that characterize that mechanism’s allocation rule. We use data from a deferred acceptance mechanism that assigns students to more than 1,000 university–major combinations in Chile. Matching theory predicts that students’ behavior in Chile should be strategic because they can list only up to eight options, and we find empirical evidence consistent with such behavior. Our bounds are informative enough to reveal significant heterogeneity in graduation success with respect to preferences and school assignment.
32434.zh_abstract: 越来越多的中央机构使用分配机制，以反映学生偏好和学校优先级的方式将学生分配到学校。然而，大多数现实世界的机制激励学生策略性地虚报其偏好。在本文中，我们提供了一种方法，用于识别学校分配对未来结果的因果效应，该方法考虑了策略性虚报。虚报可能使现有的点识别方法失效，我们推导出对策略行为稳健的因果效应的尖锐边界。我们的方法适用于任何机制，只要存在描述该机制分配规则的安置分数和截止点。我们使用智利将学生分配到超过1000个大学-专业组合的延迟接受机制的数据。匹配理论预测，智利学生的行为应该是策略性的，因为他们只能列出最多八个选项，并且我们发现了与这种行为一致的实证证据。我们的边界信息量足够大，能够揭示在偏好和学校分配方面毕业成功的显著异质性。

32433.title: The Moral Values of "Rugged Individualism"
32433.zh_title: “粗犷个人主义”的道德价值观
32433.authors: Samuel Bazzi, Martin Fiszbein, Maximiliano Garcia
32433.abstract: The United States is among the most individualistic societies in the world. However, unlike Western European individualism, which is imbued with moral universalism, America’s “rugged individualism” is instead particularistic. We link this distinctive cultural configuration to the country’s frontier history. The frontier favored self-reliance, but also rewarded cooperation, which could only be sustained through strong, local group identities. We show that counties with longer frontier history are more particularistic, displaying stronger opposition to federal taxes relative to state taxes, stronger communal values, less charitable giving to distant counties, and fewer online friendships with people in distant counties. At the same time, connections across counties display assortative matching on frontier history, highlighting the important role of culture in bridging disparate areas of the country. Overall, our results shed new light on moral values and the divergence of American and European individualism.
32433.zh_abstract: 美国是世界上最个人主义的社会之一。然而，与充满道德普遍主义的西欧个人主义不同，美国的“粗犷个人主义”反而是特殊主义的。我们将这种独特的文化形态与该国的边疆历史联系起来。边疆地区崇尚自力更生，但也奖励合作，而合作只能通过强大的本地群体认同来维持。我们表明，边疆历史更长的县更倾向于特殊主义：它们表现出对联邦税收相对于州税收更强烈的反对、更强的社群价值观、对遥远县的慈善捐赠更少，以及与遥远县居民的在线友谊更少。同时，各县之间的关联在边疆历史上表现出分类匹配，这凸显了文化在连接国家不同地区方面的重要作用。总体而言，我们的研究结果为道德价值观以及美国和欧洲个人主义的分歧提供了新的见解。

32432.title: Predicting Police Misconduct
32432.authors: Greg Stoddard, Dylan J. Fitzpatrick, Jens Ludwig
32432.abstract: Whether police misconduct can be prevented depends partly on whether it can be predicted. We show police misconduct is partially predictable and that estimated misconduct risk is not simply an artifact of measurement error or a proxy for officer activity. We also show many officers at risk of on-duty misconduct have elevated off-duty risk too, suggesting a potential link between accountability and officer wellness. We show that targeting preventive interventions even with a simple prediction model – number of past complaints, which is not as predictive as machine learning but lower-cost to deploy – has marginal value of public funds of infinity.
32432.zh_abstract: 警察不当行为能否被预防，部分取决于它能否被预测。我们表明警察不当行为是部分可预测的，并且估计的不当行为风险并非仅仅是测量误差的产物或警官活动的代理变量。我们还表明，许多有执勤不当行为风险的警官，其非执勤期间的风险也更高，这暗示了问责制与警官福祉之间可能存在联系。我们表明，即使使用简单的预测模型——即过去投诉的数量，其预测能力不如机器学习但部署成本更低——来针对性地实施预防性干预，其公共资金的边际价值也是无穷大的。

32431.title: The Dynamic Effects of Cash Transfers to Agricultural Households
32431.zh_title: 现金转移对农业家庭的动态效应
32431.authors: Shilpa Aggarwal, Jenny C. Aker, Dahyeon Jeong, Naresh Kumar, David Sungho Park, Jonathan Robinson, Alan Spearot
32431.abstract: While cash transfers will tautologically increase contemporaneous consumption, it is unclear whether these gains will persist, especially in rural agricultural settings with limited productive investment opportunities. Using bi-monthly survey data from recipients of a large, unconditional cash transfer in Liberia and Malawi, we document sustained food security improvements until 1.5-2 years after disbursement, driven by increased farm investments and production. We additionally document reductions in casual off-farm labor, increases in psychological well-being and, in Liberia, a decline in IPV. We find similar increases in harvest output across different transfer sizes. Those receiving larger transfers spend more on housing and durables.
32431.zh_abstract: 虽然现金转移在逻辑上会增加当期消费，但这些收益能否持续尚不清楚，尤其是在生产性投资机会有限的农村农业环境中。利用来自利比里亚和马拉维大规模无条件现金转移接受者的双月调查数据，我们记录了在发放后1.5至2年内持续的粮食安全改善，这由农业投资和产量的增加所驱动。我们还记录了非农临时劳动的减少、心理福祉的提升，以及在利比里亚，亲密伴侣暴力的下降。我们发现不同转移规模下的收获产量增长相似。接受较大转移的家庭在住房和耐用品上支出更多。

32430.title: Artificial Intelligence and the Skill Premium
32430.authors: David E. Bloom, Klaus Prettner, Jamel Saadaoui, Mario Veruete
32430.abstract: How will the emergence of ChatGPT and other forms of artificial intelligence (AI) affect the skill premium? To address this question, we propose a nested constant elasticity of substitution production function that distinguishes among three types of capital: traditional physical capital (machines, assembly lines), industrial robots, and AI. Following the literature, we assume that industrial robots predominantly substitute for low-skill workers, whereas AI mainly helps to perform the tasks of high-skill workers. We show that AI reduces the skill premium as long as it is more substitutable for high-skill workers than low-skill workers are for high-skill workers.
32430.zh_abstract: ChatGPT及其他形式人工智能的出现将如何影响技能溢价？为回答这个问题，我们提出一个嵌套的恒定替代弹性生产函数，该函数区分了三种资本类型：传统实物资本（机器、装配线）、工业机器人和人工智能。遵循文献，我们假设工业机器人主要替代低技能工人，而人工智能主要帮助执行高技能工人的任务。我们表明，只要人工智能对高技能工人的可替代性高于低技能工人对高技能工人的可替代性，人工智能就会降低技能溢价。

32429.title: Integrating Minorities in the Classroom: The Role of Students, Parents, and Teachers
32429.zh_title: 在课堂中融合少数群体：学生、家长和教师的作用
32429.authors: Alexandra de Gendre, Krzysztof Karbownik, Nicolás Salamanca, Yves Zenou
32429.abstract: We develop a multi-agent model of the education production function where investments of students, parents, and teachers are linked to the presence of minorities in the classroom. We then test the key implications of this model using rich survey data and a mandate to randomly assign students to classrooms. Consistent with our model, we show that exposure to minority peers decreases student effort, parental investments, and teacher engagement and it results in lower student test scores. Observables correlated with minority status explain less than a third of the reduced-form test score effect while over a third can be descriptively attributed to endogenous responses of the agents.
32429.zh_abstract: 我们构建了一个教育生产函数的多主体模型，其中学生、家长和教师的投资与课堂中少数群体的存在相关联。然后，我们利用丰富的调查数据和一项强制将学生随机分配到班级的规定，检验了该模型的关键含义。与我们的模型一致，我们表明接触少数群体同辈会降低学生的努力程度、家长的投资和教师的参与度，并导致学生考试成绩下降。与少数群体地位相关的可观测变量解释了简化形式考试成绩效应的不到三分之一，而超过三分之一可以描述性地归因于各主体的内生反应。

32428.title: Early Predictors of Racial Disparities in Criminal Justice Involvement
32428.zh_title: 刑事司法参与中种族差异的早期预测因素
32428.authors: Andrew Jordan, Ezra Karger, Derek Neal
32428.abstract: We examine ten cohorts of male eighth graders in public schools in Chicago, IL: 1995-2004. We find large racial disparities in academic achievement, socioeconomic status (SES), and adult criminal justice involvement. Our measures of SES and academic achievement are strong predictors of future felony arraignment and incarceration, even among students of the same race who attend the same school, but mappings between student characteristics and adult criminal justice outcomes vary greatly by race. Our measures of early achievement, SES, and early environment predict only small portions of the overall Black-Hispanic disparities in adult criminal justice involvement but typically predict at least half of Black-White criminal justice disparities and over eighty percent of Hispanic-White disparities. The relationships between various value-added measures of eighth-grade school quality and future criminal justice outcomes also vary by race. Schools that excel at promoting on-time matriculation from eighth grade to high school significantly reduce rates of criminal justice involvement among Black males.
32428.zh_abstract: 我们考察了伊利诺伊州芝加哥市公立学校1995年至2004年十届八年级男生群体。我们发现学业成绩、社会经济地位和成年后刑事司法参与方面存在巨大的种族差异。我们的社会经济地位和学业成绩指标是未来重罪传讯和监禁的有力预测因素，即使在就读同一所学校的同种族学生中也是如此，但学生特征与成年刑事司法结果之间的映射关系因种族而异。我们的早期成绩、社会经济地位和早期环境指标仅能预测整体黑人与西班牙裔成年刑事司法参与差异的一小部分，但通常能预测至少一半的黑人与白人刑事司法差异，以及超过百分之八十的西班牙裔与白人差异。八年级学校质量的各种增值指标与未来刑事司法结果之间的关系也因种族而异。在促进八年级学生按时升入高中方面表现出色的学校，显著降低了黑人男性的刑事司法参与率。

32427.title: The Negligible Effect of Free Contraception on Fertility: Experimental Evidence from Burkina Faso
32427.zh_title: 免费避孕对生育率的可忽略影响：来自布基纳法索的实验证据
32427.authors: Pascaline Dupas, Seema Jayachandran, Adriana Lleras-Muney, Pauline Rossi
32427.abstract: We conducted a randomized trial among 14,545 households in rural Burkina Faso to test the oft-cited hypothesis that limited access to contraception is an important driver of high fertility rates in West Africa. We do not find support for this hypothesis. Women who were given free access to medical contraception for three years did not have lower birth rates; we can reject even modest effects. We cross-randomized additional interventions to address possible inefficiencies leading to low demand for free contraception, specifically misperceptions about the child mortality rate, limited exposure to opposing views about family size and contraception, and social pressure. Free contraception did not influence fertility even in combination with these other interventions.
32427.zh_abstract: 我们在布基纳法索农村地区对14,545户家庭进行了一项随机试验，以检验一个常被引用的假设：避孕药具获取受限是西非高生育率的重要驱动因素。我们没有找到支持这一假设的证据。获得免费医疗避孕药具三年的女性并未降低生育率；我们甚至可以排除适度的效应。我们交叉随机化了额外的干预措施，以解决可能导致对免费避孕需求低下的潜在低效率问题，具体包括对儿童死亡率的误解、接触关于家庭规模和避孕的反对意见有限，以及社会压力。即使与这些其他干预措施相结合，免费避孕也未影响生育率。

32426.title: Cities as Engines of Opportunities: Evidence from Brazil
32426.zh_title: 城市作为机遇引擎：来自巴西的证据
32426.authors: Radu Barza, Edward L. Glaeser, César A. Hidalgo, Martina Viarengo
32426.abstract: Are developing-world cities engines of opportunities for low-wage earners? In this study, we track a cohort of young low-income workers in Brazil for thirteen years to explore the contribution of factors such as industrial structure and skill segregation on upward income mobility. We find that cities in the south of Brazil are more effective engines of upward mobility than cities in the north and that these differences appear to be primarily related to the exposure of unskilled workers to skilled co-workers, which in turn reflects industry composition and complexity. Our results suggest that the positive effects of urbanization depend on the skilled and unskilled working together, a form of integration that is more prevalent in the cities of southern Brazil than in northern cities. This segregation, which can decline with specialization and the division of labor, may hinder the ability of Brazil's northern cities to offer more opportunities for escaping poverty.
32426.zh_abstract: 发展中国家的城市是低收入者向上流动的引擎吗？在本研究中，我们追踪了巴西一批年轻低收入工作者长达十三年，以探索产业结构、技能隔离等因素对向上收入流动性的贡献。我们发现，巴西南部城市比北部城市更有效地充当了向上流动的引擎，这些差异似乎主要与非熟练工人接触熟练同事有关，而这又反映了产业构成和复杂性。我们的结果表明，城市化的积极效应取决于熟练工人和非熟练工人共同工作，这种融合形式在巴西南部城市比北部城市更为普遍。这种隔离可能随着专业化和劳动分工而减弱，但也可能阻碍巴西北部城市提供更多摆脱贫困机会的能力。
32426.meta: Programs：DEV, LS；JEL：D63, I24, N90, N96, O10, O11, O18, O43, R10, R23

32425.title: Identifying the Cumulative Causal Effect of a Non-Binary Treatment from a Binary Instrument
32425.zh_title: 从二元工具变量识别非二元处理的累积因果效应
32425.abstract: The effect of a treatment may depend on the intensity with which it is administered. We study identification of ordered treatment effects with a binary instrument, focusing on the effect of moving from the treatment’s minimum to maximum intensity. With arbitrary heterogeneity across units, standard IV assumptions (Angrist and Imbens, 1995) do not constrain this parameter, even among compliers. We consider a range of additional assumptions and show how they can deliver sharp, informative bounds. We illustrate our approach with two applications, involving the effect of (1) health insurance on emergency department usage, and (2) attendance in an after-school program on student learning.
32425.zh_abstract: 处理效应可能取决于其施加强度。我们研究使用二元工具变量识别有序处理效应，重点关注从处理的最小强度移动到最大强度的效应。在存在任意单位异质性的情况下，即使是在依从者中，标准工具变量假设（Angrist and Imbens, 1995）也无法约束该参数。我们考虑一系列额外假设，并展示它们如何能够提供尖锐且信息丰富的边界。我们通过两个应用来说明我们的方法，涉及（1）医疗保险对急诊科使用的影响，以及（2）参加课后项目对学生学习的影响。

32424.title: Disentangling Exploration from Exploitation
32424.zh_title: 将探索与利用分离开来
32424.authors: Alessandro Lizzeri, Eran Shmaya, Leeat Yariv
32424.abstract: Starting from Robbins (1952), the literature on experimentation via multi-armed bandits has wed exploration and exploitation. Nonetheless, in many applications, agents' exploration and exploitation need not be intertwined: a policymaker may assess new policies different than the status quo; an investor may evaluate projects outside her portfolio. We characterize the optimal experimentation policy when exploration and exploitation are disentangled in the case of Poisson bandits, allowing for general news structures. The optimal policy features complete learning asymptotically, exhibits lots of persistence, but cannot be identified by an index à la Gittins. Disentanglement is particularly valuable for intermediate parameter values.
32424.zh_abstract: 从Robbins（1952）开始，关于通过多臂老虎机进行实验的文献将探索与利用结合在一起。然而，在许多应用中，主体的探索和利用不必交织在一起：政策制定者可以评估不同于现状的新政策；投资者可以评估其投资组合之外的项目。我们刻画了在探索与利用分离的情况下，针对泊松老虎机并允许一般新闻结构的最优实验政策。最优政策在渐近意义上具有完全学习的特征，表现出很强的持续性，但无法通过Gittins指数来识别。分离对于中间参数值尤其有价值。
32424.meta: Programs：EH, IO, LE, LS, ME, POL；JEL：C73, D81, D83, O35

32423.title: The Effects of Mental Health Interventions on Labor Market Outcomes in Low- and Middle-Income Countries
32423.zh_title: 中低收入国家心理健康干预对劳动力市场结果的影响
32423.authors: Crick Lund, Kate Orkin, Marc Witte, John H. Walker, Thandi Davies, Johannes Haushofer, Sarah Murray, Judy Bass, Laura Murray, Wietse Tol, Vikram H. Patel
32423.abstract: Mental health conditions are prevalent but rarely treated in low- and middle-income countries (LMICs). Little is known about how these conditions affect economic participation. This paper shows that treating mental health conditions substantially improves recipients’ capacity to work in these contexts. First, we perform a systematic review and meta-analysis of all randomized controlled trials (RCTs) ever conducted that evaluate treatments for mental ill-health and measure economic outcomes in LMICs. On average, treating common mental disorders like depression with psychotherapy improves an aggregate of labor market outcomes made up of employment, time spent working, capacity to work and job search by 0.16 standard deviations. Treating severe mental disorders, like schizophrenia, improves the aggregate by 0.30 standard deviations, but effects are noisily estimated. Second, we build a new dataset, pooling all available microdata from RCTs using the most common trial design: studies of psychotherapy in LMICs that treated depression and measured days participants were unable to work in the past month. We observe comparable treatment effects on mental health and work outcomes in this sub-sample of highly similar studies. We also show evidence consistent with mental health being the mechanism through which psychotherapy improves work outcomes.
32423.zh_abstract: 心理健康问题在中低收入国家普遍存在，但很少得到治疗。关于这些问题如何影响经济参与，我们知之甚少。本文表明，在这些背景下，治疗心理健康问题能显著改善受益者的工作能力。首先，我们对所有在中低收入国家评估心理健康问题治疗并衡量经济结果的随机对照试验进行了系统回顾和荟萃分析。平均而言，用心理疗法治疗抑郁症等常见精神障碍，能使由就业、工作时间、工作能力和求职构成的劳动力市场综合指标提高0.16个标准差。治疗精神分裂症等严重精神障碍，能使该综合指标提高0.30个标准差，但效应估计的噪声较大。其次，我们构建了一个新数据集，汇集了来自使用最常见试验设计（即在中低收入国家进行的、治疗抑郁症并衡量参与者过去一个月无法工作天数的心理疗法研究）的随机对照试验的所有可用微观数据。在这个高度相似的研究子样本中，我们观察到心理健康和工作结果的治疗效果具有可比性。我们还展示了与心理健康是心理疗法改善工作结果的机制相一致的证据。
32423.meta: Programs：DEV, EH, LS；JEL：D9, I14, J24, O1

32484.title: Why Doesn’t the United States Have National Health Insurance? The Political Role of the American Medical Association
32484.zh_title: 为什么美国没有全民健康保险？美国医学会的政治角色
32484.abstract: This study examines a critical juncture in the development of health insurance in the United States. We examine how the American Medical Association (AMA) reduced support for National Health Insurance (NHI) in the immediate post-World War II period and contributed to the entrenchment of private insurance coverage. The AMA’s national campaign against NHI - directed by the country’s first political public relations firm, Whitaker & Baxter’s Campaigns, Inc. - implemented a two-pronged strategy: (1) persuade the American voter that supporting NHI was equivalent to supporting socialism; and, (2) enroll working-age adults (and eventually their dependents) in private health insurance plans to reduce demand for a public scheme. We bring together archival data from several novel sources documenting Campaign operations, which involved leveraging mass communications, the professional network, and the social standing of physicians. We find a one standard deviation increase in Campaign exposure explains approximately 20% of the increase in private health insurance enrollment and a similar decline in public opinion support for legislation enacting NHI. We present several findings that suggest the Campaign influenced policymaking directly: via passage of Campaign-drafted resolutions by civic organizations, adoption of Campaign language in Congress, and donations to the 1952 Republican presidential candidate through an AMA-WB political action committee. These findings suggest that the rise of private health insurance in the U.S. was not solely due to wartime wage freezes, collective bargaining, or favorable tax treatment. Rather, it was also enabled by an interest group-financed Campaign.
32484.zh_abstract: 本研究考察了美国健康保险发展中的一个关键节点。我们研究了美国医学会（AMA）如何在二战刚结束后的时期减少了对全民健康保险（NHI）的支持，并促成了私人保险覆盖的巩固。AMA反对NHI的全国性运动——由该国第一家政治公关公司Whitaker & Baxter's Campaigns, Inc.指导——实施了一项双管齐下的策略：（1）说服美国选民，支持NHI等同于支持社会主义；（2）让工作年龄成年人（以及最终他们的家属）加入私人健康保险计划，以减少对公共计划的需求。我们汇集了来自多个新来源的档案数据，记录了Campaign的运作，该运作利用了大众传播、专业网络和医生的社会地位。我们发现，Campaign暴露度每增加一个标准差，可以解释私人健康保险参保率约20%的增长，以及公众对实施NHI立法的支持率类似的下降。我们提出了几项发现，表明Campaign直接影响了政策制定：通过民间组织通过Campaign起草的决议、国会采纳Campaign的语言、以及通过一个AMA-WB政治行动委员会向1952年共和党总统候选人捐款。这些发现表明，美国私人健康保险的兴起并非仅仅由于战时工资冻结、集体谈判或优惠税收待遇。相反，它也是由一个利益集团资助的Campaign促成的。
32484.meta: Programs：EH, POL；JEL：D72, I14, I18, N34, N42

32483.title: (Pro-) Social Learning and Strategic Disclosure
32483.abstract: We study a sequential experimentation model with endogenous feedback. Agents choose between a safe and risky action, the latter generating stochastic rewards. When making this choice, each agent is selfishly motivated (myopic). However, agents can disclose their experiences to a public record, and when doing so are pro-socially motivated (forward-looking). When prior uncertainty is large, disclosure is both polarized (only extreme signals are disclosed) and positively biased (no feedback is bad news). When prior uncertainty is small, a novel form of unraveling occurs and disclosure is complete. Subsidizing disclosure costs can perversely lead to less disclosure but more experimentation.
32483.zh_abstract: 我们研究了一个具有内生反馈的序贯实验模型。代理人需要在安全行动和风险行动之间做出选择，后者会产生随机回报。在做出这一选择时，每个代理人都受自私动机驱动（短视）。然而，代理人可以将他们的经历披露到公共记录中，并且在这样做时受亲社会动机驱动（前瞻性）。当先验不确定性很大时，披露既是两极化的（只有极端信号被披露）也是正向偏倚的（没有反馈是坏消息）。当先验不确定性很小时，会出现一种新颖形式的“拆解”现象，披露是完全的。补贴披露成本可能会反常地导致更少的披露但更多的实验。

32482.title: Inflation's Impact on American Households
32482.zh_title: 通胀对美国居民家庭的影响
32482.authors: David Altig, Alan J. Auerbach, Erin F. Eidschun, Laurence J. Kotlikoff, Victor Yifan Ye
32482.abstract: The post-COVID price surge has reignited interest in inflation’s impact on American households. Even if anticipated and with full market adjustments, inflation affects households through its interaction with the fiscal system, which is the focus of this paper. Inflation affects households through its interaction with the fiscal. We run the 2019 Survey of Consumer Finances (SCF), assuming different inflation rates, through the Fiscal Analyzer (TFA) – a life cycle, consumption-smoothing tool incorporating all major federal and state fiscal programs. Before doing so, we adjust the SCF data to neutralize inflation’s non-fiscal effects. A permanent increase in the inflation rate from zero to 10 percent reduces median lifetime spending by 6.82 percent. This impact is smaller – 4.74 percent – when fiscal COLAs aren’t lagged. But the big stories are the progressivity of inflation’s increase in net taxation, its age pattern, and its heterogeneity. The 15.9 percent median lifetime spending loss of the top 1 percent from 10 percent inflation is roughly 2.5 times that of the bottom quintile. Middle aged households are hit far harder because they have more asset income, which, with inflation, is taxed at a higher effective rate. The 25th percentile of spending changes is a reduction of 9.84 percent. The 75th percentile change is still a reduction of 4.83 percent. The maximum spending decline (increase) across all households is 64.9 (46.7) percent. Thus, the distribution of welfare is highly sensitive to significant, ongoing inflation.
32482.zh_abstract: 新冠疫情后的价格飙升重新激发了人们对通胀影响美国居民家庭的兴趣。即使通胀被预期到且市场进行了充分调整，它仍会通过与财政体系的相互作用来影响家庭，这正是本文的焦点。我们利用2019年消费者金融调查（SCF）数据，假设不同的通胀率，通过财政分析器（TFA）——一个包含所有主要联邦和州财政项目的生命周期消费平滑工具——进行分析。在此之前，我们对SCF数据进行了调整，以消除通胀的非财政效应。通胀率从零永久性上升至10%，会使终身中位支出下降6.82%。当财政生活成本调整（COLA）不存在滞后时，这一影响较小，为4.74%。但关键问题在于通胀导致净税收增加的累进性、其年龄模式及其异质性。对于收入最高的1%人群，10%的通胀导致终身中位支出损失15.9%，大约是收入最低五分之一人群的2.5倍。中年家庭受到的冲击要大得多，因为他们拥有更多的资产收入，而在通胀下，这些收入面临更高的有效税率。支出变化的第25百分位是下降9.84%，第75百分位仍然是下降4.83%。所有家庭中，最大支出下降（上升）幅度为64.9%（46.7%）。因此，福利分配对持续的高通胀高度敏感。

32481.title: There is No Excess Volatility Puzzle
32481.authors: Andrew Atkeson, Jonathan Heathcote, Fabrizio Perri
32481.abstract: We present two valuation models that we use to account for the annual data on price per share and dividends per share for the CRSP Value-Weighted Index from 1929-2023. We show that it is a simple matter to account for these data based purely on a model of variation over time in the expected ratio of dividends per share to aggregate consumption under two conditions. First, investors must receive news shocks regarding the expected ratio of dividends per share to aggregate consumption in the long run. Second, the discount rate used to evaluate the impact of this news on the current price per share must be low. We use the approach of Campbell and Shiller (1987) and Campbell and Shiller (1988) to argue that the cash flow news in our model is not a stand-in for changes in expected returns: with our model parameters, returns are not predictable and price dividend spreads and ratios predict dividend growth at model-implied magnitudes. We illustrate which parameter choices account for differences between our results and prior findings in the literature. We conclude that the answer to Shiller (1981)’s question “Do stock prices move too much to be justified by subsequent movements in dividends?” is “not necessarily”.
32481.zh_abstract: 我们提出了两个估值模型，用于解释1929年至2023年CRSP市值加权指数的每股价格和每股股息的年度数据。我们证明，仅基于每股股息与总消费之比的预期随时间变化的模型，在满足两个条件时，就能轻易解释这些数据。首先，投资者必须接收到关于长期内每股股息与总消费之比的预期的新息冲击。其次，用于评估该新息对当前每股价格影响的贴现率必须较低。我们采用Campbell和Shiller（1987）以及Campbell和Shiller（1988）的方法，论证我们模型中的现金流新息并非预期收益变化的替代品：在我们的模型参数下，收益不可预测，而价格股息差和比率以模型隐含的幅度预测股息增长。我们说明了哪些参数选择可以解释我们的结果与文献中先前发现之间的差异。我们得出结论，对于Shiller（1981）的问题“股票价格是否波动过大，以至于无法用随后的股息变动来证明？”，答案是“未必”。

32480.title: Dynamic Efficiency and Pricing of Innovations with Insurance: The Case for Gene Therapies
32480.zh_title: 动态效率与创新定价（含保险）：以基因疗法为例
32480.abstract: I demonstrate that to achieve dynamic efficiency, the optimal share of total surplus that a social payer should transfer to an innovating industry for a current asset depends on the marginal product of investment and the share of profits invested by the industry on the current asset and not on returns from future innovations. This insight arises from using a dynamic multi-period model of optimal transfers rather than a static two-period model with one optimal transfer, as used in the literature. I delve into the implications for alternative pricing of healthcare innovations - value-based prices using cost-effectiveness analysis, monopoly prices under the social demand curve, and monopoly profit preserving prices under insurance – for surplus appropriation by the innovating industry.
