I also explore how alternative financing mechanisms used by social payers and the demand uncertainty that innovators face impact this appropriation share. I illustrate these concepts with a substantive example of pricing gene therapy for sickle cell disease in the United States
32480.zh_abstract: 我证明，为了实现动态效率，社会支付方应将当前资产总剩余的最优份额转移给创新行业，该份额取决于投资的边际产品以及该行业将利润投资于当前资产的比例，而非未来创新的回报。这一见解源于使用动态多期最优转移模型，而非文献中使用的静态两期单次最优转移模型。我深入探讨了替代性医疗创新定价方式——基于成本效益分析的价值定价、社会需求曲线下的垄断定价以及保险下的垄断利润维持定价——对创新行业剩余获取的影响。我还探讨了社会支付方使用的替代性融资机制以及创新者面临的需求不确定性如何影响这一获取份额。我以美国镰状细胞病基因疗法定价的具体实例来说明这些概念。

32479.title: Credit, Land Speculation, and Long-Run Economic Growth
32479.zh_title: 信贷、土地投机与长期经济增长
32479.abstract: This paper analyses the impact of credit expansions arising from increases in collateral values or lower interest rate policies on long-run productivity and economic growth in a two-sector endogenous growth economy with credit frictions, with the driver of growth lying in one sector (manufacturing) but not in the other (real estate). We show that it is not so much aggregate credit expansion that matters for long-run productivity and economic growth but sectoral credit expansions. Credit expansions associated mainly with relaxation of real estate financing (capital investment financing) will be productivity-and growth-retarding (enhancing). Without financial regulations, low interest rates and more expansionary monetary policy may so encourage land speculation using leverage that productive capital investment and economic growth are decreased. Unlike in standard macroeconomic models, in ours, the equilibrium price of land will be finite even if the safe rate of interest is less than the rate of output growth.
32479.zh_abstract: 本文在一个存在信贷摩擦的两部门内生增长经济体中，分析了由抵押品价值上升或低利率政策引发的信贷扩张对长期生产率和经济增长的影响，其中增长动力来自一个部门（制造业）而非另一个部门（房地产）。我们表明，对长期生产率和经济增长起关键作用的并非总体信贷扩张，而是部门信贷扩张。主要与房地产融资放松（资本投资融资放松）相关的信贷扩张将抑制（促进）生产率和增长。在没有金融监管的情况下，低利率和更扩张性的货币政策可能如此鼓励利用杠杆进行土地投机，以至于减少了生产性资本投资和经济增长。与标准宏观经济模型不同，在我们的模型中，即使安全利率低于产出增长率，土地的均衡价格也是有限的。

32478.title: Fiscal Consequences of Central Bank Losses
32478.zh_title: 中央银行损失的财政后果
32478.abstract: In response to the Global Financial Crisis, central banks engaged in large-scale asset purchases funded by the issuance of reserves. These “unconventional” policies continued during the pandemic, so that by 2022 central banks’ balance sheets had grown up to ten-fold. As a result of rapidly increasing interest rates, these massive portfolios began producing substantial losses. We interpret these losses as fiscal policy consequences of quantitative easing and stress that they must be balanced against the prior benefits of implementing purchase policies. Importantly, losses differ qualitatively depending on whether the central bank chooses to buy domestic or foreign assets, thus resulting in transfers either within or between countries. Effects of losses may differ due to accounting rules (when losses are realized) and when the fiscal authority compensates for losses (the structure of indemnification agreements). Data from the Federal Reserve, the Eurosystem, and the Bank of England show that maximum annual losses are between 0.3 and 1.5 percent of GDP. By contrast, the Swiss National Bank is sustaining losses up to 17 percent of GDP.
32478.zh_abstract: 为应对全球金融危机，中央银行通过发行准备金进行大规模资产购买。这些“非常规”政策在疫情期间得以延续，到2022年，中央银行的资产负债表规模已增长至原来的十倍。由于利率迅速上升，这些庞大的投资组合开始产生巨额亏损。我们将这些损失解释为量化宽松政策的财政后果，并强调必须将其与实施购买政策的事先收益相权衡。重要的是，损失的性质因中央银行选择购买国内资产还是国外资产而有所不同，从而导致国家内部或国家之间的转移。损失的影响可能因会计规则（损失何时实现）以及财政当局何时补偿损失（赔偿协议的结构）而不同。来自美联储、欧元体系和英格兰银行的数据显示，最大年度损失在GDP的0.3%至1.5%之间。相比之下，瑞士国家银行承受的损失高达GDP的17%。

32477.title: Racial Protests and Credit Access
32477.abstract: Recent local racial protests and the subsequent national racial justice movement following George Floyd’s death heightened awareness of racial disparities in the US. Analyzing Paycheck Protection Program loans using difference-in-differences and event-study methodologies, we find that local racial protests improve credit access for Black business owners. The increased social media and public attention following George Floyd’s death also positively influenced public perceptions of racial equity, leading to relatively larger loan amounts for Black business owners compared to other racial-ethnic groups. We find implicit and explicit racial biases, including within the finance sector, decreased after Floyd’s death, driving these effects.
32477.zh_abstract: 乔治·弗洛伊德去世后，近期的地方种族抗议以及随后的全国性种族正义运动提高了人们对美国种族差异的认识。通过使用双重差分法和事件研究法分析薪资保护计划（PPP）贷款，我们发现地方种族抗议改善了黑人企业主的信贷获取。乔治·弗洛伊德去世后社交媒体和公众关注度的增加也积极影响了公众对种族公平的看法，导致黑人企业主获得的贷款金额相对于其他种族-族裔群体更大。我们发现，在弗洛伊德去世后，包括金融部门在内的内隐和外显种族偏见有所减少，从而推动了这些效应。
32477.meta: Programs：CF, EH, PR；JEL：G20, G28, G40, J15, J7, L26

32476.title: What Drives Investors' Portfolio Choices? Separating Risk Preferences from Frictions
32476.zh_title: 是什么驱动了投资者的投资组合选择？分离风险偏好与摩擦
32476.abstract: We study the role of risk preferences and frictions in portfolio choice using variation in 401(k) default options. Patterns of active choice in response to different default funds imply that, absent participation frictions, 94% of investors prefer holding stocks, with an equity share of retirement wealth declining with age—patterns markedly different from observed allocations. We use this quasi-experiment to estimate a life cycle model and find a relative risk aversion of 2.5, EIS of 0.25, and $\$160$ portfolio adjustment cost. Our results suggest that low levels of stock market participation in retirement accounts are due to participation frictions rather than non-standard preferences such as loss-aversion.
32476.zh_abstract: 我们利用401(k)默认选项的变化来研究风险偏好和摩擦在投资组合选择中的作用。针对不同默认基金做出的主动选择模式表明，在没有参与摩擦的情况下，94%的投资者偏好持有股票，且退休财富中的股票份额随年龄增长而下降——这些模式与观察到的资产配置截然不同。我们利用这一准实验来估计生命周期模型，发现相对风险厌恶系数为2.5，跨期替代弹性（EIS）为0.25，投资组合调整成本为160美元。我们的结果表明，退休账户中股票市场参与率低是由于参与摩擦，而非损失厌恶等非标准偏好。
32476.meta: Programs：AG, AP, CF；JEL：D14, D15, G0, G11, G40, G5, G51, J32

32475.title: Gendered Change: 150 Years of Transformation in US Hours
32475.zh_title: 性别变迁：美国工作时长的150年转型
32475.authors: L. Rachel Ngai, Claudia Olivetti, Barbara Petrongolo
32475.abstract: Women's contribution to the economy has been markedly underestimated in predominantly agricultural societies, due to their widespread involvement in unpaid agricultural work. Combining data from the US Census and several early sources, we create a consistent measure of male and female employment and hours for the US for 1870-2019, including paid work and unpaid work in family farms and non-farm businesses. The resulting measure of hours traces a U-shape for women, with a modest decline up to mid-20th century followed by a sustained increase, and a monotonic decline for men. We propose a multisector economy with uneven productivity growth, income effects, and consumption complementarity across sectoral outputs. During early development stages, declining agriculture leads to rising services -- both in the market and the home -- and leisure, reducing market work for both genders. In later stages, structural transformation reallocates labor from manufacturing into services, while marketization reallocates labor from home to market services. Given gender comparative advantages, the first channel is more relevant for men, reducing male hours, while the second channel is more relevant for women, increasing female hours. Our quantitative illustration suggests that structural transformation and marketization can account for the overall decline in market hours from 1880-1950, and one quarter of the rise and decline, respectively, in female and male market hours from 1950-2019.
32475.zh_abstract: 在主要农业社会中，由于女性广泛参与无酬农业劳动，她们对经济的贡献被显著低估。结合美国人口普查数据和多个早期来源，我们为1870-2019年的美国创建了一致的男性和女性就业及工作时长衡量指标，包括有酬工作以及家庭农场和非农企业中的无酬工作。由此得出的女性工作时长呈U形，在20世纪中期之前略有下降，随后持续上升；男性工作时长则呈单调下降。我们提出了一个包含不均匀生产率增长、收入效应以及部门产出间消费互补性的多部门经济体。在早期发展阶段，农业的衰退导致市场服务和家庭服务以及休闲的增加，从而减少了男女双方的市场工作。在后期阶段，结构转型将劳动力从制造业重新配置到服务业，而市场化则将劳动力从家庭服务重新配置到市场服务。鉴于性别比较优势，第一个渠道对男性更为相关，减少了男性工作时长；第二个渠道对女性更为相关，增加了女性工作时长。我们的定量说明表明，结构转型和市场化可以解释1880-1950年市场工作时长的总体下降，以及1950-2019年女性和男性市场工作时长分别上升和下降的四分之一。

32474.title: Old Moats for New Models: Openness, Control, and Competition in Generative AI
32474.zh_title: 新模型的旧护城河：生成式人工智能中的开放性、控制与竞争
32474.authors: Pierre Azoulay, Joshua L. Krieger, Abhishek Nagaraj
32474.abstract: Drawing insights from the field of innovation economics, we discuss the likely competitive environment shaping generative AI advances. Central to our analysis are the concepts of appropriability—whether firms in the industry are able to control the knowledge generated by their innovations—and complementary assets—whether effective entry requires access to specialized infrastructure and capabilities to which incumbent firms can ration access. While the rapid improvements in AI foundation models promise transformative impacts across broad sectors of the economy, we argue that tight control over complementary assets will likely result in a concentrated market structure, as in past episodes of technological upheaval. We suggest the likely paths through which incumbent firms may restrict entry, confining newcomers to subordinate roles and stifling broad sectoral innovation. We conclude with speculations regarding how this oligopolistic future might be averted. Policy interventions aimed at fractionalizing or facilitating shared access to complementary assets might help preserve competition and incentives for extending the generative AI frontier. Ironically, the best hopes for a vibrant open source AI ecosystem might rest on the presence of a “rogue” technology giant, who might choose openness and engagement with smaller firms as a strategic weapon wielded against other incumbents.
32474.zh_abstract: 借鉴创新经济学的见解，我们讨论了可能塑造生成式人工智能进步的竞争环境。我们分析的核心概念是“可占有性”——即行业内的企业能否控制其创新所产生的知识——以及“互补性资产”——即有效进入是否需要获取在位企业可以限制使用的专业基础设施和能力。尽管人工智能基础模型的快速改进有望对经济的广泛领域产生变革性影响，但我们认为，对互补性资产的严格控制可能会导致市场结构集中，正如过去技术剧变时期所发生的那样。我们指出了在位企业可能限制进入、将新来者限制在从属角色并扼杀广泛部门创新的可能路径。最后，我们推测了如何避免这种寡头垄断的未来。旨在分割或促进互补性资产共享获取的政策干预，可能有助于维护竞争和扩展生成式人工智能前沿的激励。具有讽刺意味的是，一个充满活力的开源人工智能生态系统的最佳希望可能在于存在一个“叛逆”的技术巨头，它可能选择开放并与小公司合作，作为对抗其他在位企业的战略武器。

32473.title: Dynamic Collective Action and the Power of Large Numbers
32473.zh_title: 动态集体行动与大数力量
32473.abstract: Individuals in a group decide over time whether or not to participate in a collective action. The cost of participation is private information, and a minimum number of participants is required for success. Individuals have incentives to delay their decisions to observe the commitments of others, resulting in complex equilibrium dynamics. While the probability of success is always positive, there is a positive probability that the process halts before success is achieved. For large groups, success is either achieved instantly or never, depending on the rate at which the required number of participants diverges to infinity.
32473.zh_abstract: 一个群体中的个体随时间推移决定是否参与集体行动。参与成本是私人信息，并且需要最低数量的参与者才能成功。个体有动机延迟决策以观察他人的承诺，从而导致复杂的均衡动态。虽然成功的概率始终为正，但过程在成功实现之前停止的概率也为正。对于大型群体，成功要么立即实现，要么永远不会实现，这取决于所需参与者数量趋于无穷大的速率。

32472.title: Shrinking the Term Structure
32472.authors: Damir Filipović, Markus Pelger, Ye Ye
32472.abstract: We propose a new framework to explain the factor structure in the full cross section of Treasury bond returns. Our method unifies non-parametric curve estimation with cross-sectional factor modeling. We identify smoothness as a fundamental principle of the term structure of returns. Our approach implies investable factors, which correspond to the optimal spanning basis functions in decreasing order of smoothness. Our factors explain the slope and curvature shapes frequently encountered in PCA. In a comprehensive empirical study, we show that the first four factors explain the time-series variation and risk premia of the term structure of excess returns. Cash flows are covariances as the exposure of bonds to factors is fully explained by cash flow information. We identify a state-dependent complexity premium. The fourth factor, which captures complex shapes of the term structure premium, substantially reduces pricing errors and pays off during recessions.
32472.zh_abstract: 我们提出了一个新框架来解释国债收益率完整截面中的因子结构。我们的方法将非参数曲线估计与截面因子建模统一起来。我们将平滑性识别为收益率期限结构的一个基本原则。我们的方法隐含了可投资的因子，这些因子对应于按平滑性递减顺序排列的最优跨期基函数。我们的因子解释了主成分分析中经常遇到的斜率和曲率形状。在一项全面的实证研究中，我们表明前四个因子解释了超额收益率期限结构的时间序列变化和风险溢价。现金流是协方差，因为债券对因子的暴露完全由现金流信息解释。我们识别出一个状态依赖的复杂性溢价。第四个因子捕捉了期限结构溢价的复杂形状，显著减少了定价误差，并在经济衰退期间获得回报。

32471.title: Unions, wages and hours
32471.abstract: We examine union-non-union differentials in wages and hours in the United States over the last 50 years using data from the Current Population Survey (CPS). The regression-adjusted difference between union members’ and non-members’ hourly earnings has been falling since the Great Recession. The union differential in weekly wages has been more stable. Although it fell by around 5 log points during COVID it remains 15 log points. This weekly earnings differential arises from both a higher hourly wage of around 10 log points and longer working hours (5 log points). The working hours differential partly reflects unions’ ability to tackle under-employment, such that union workers work closer to the hours they desire than their non-union counterparts. The traditional focus on hourly wage differentials underplays the important role trade unions play in maintaining members’ weekly earnings by ensuring workers receive the paid hours they desire.
32471.zh_abstract: 我们利用当前人口调查数据，研究了美国过去50年中工会与非工会成员在工资和工时上的差异。自大衰退以来，工会成员与非成员小时工资的回归调整差异一直在下降。工会成员在周工资上的差异更为稳定。尽管在新冠疫情期间下降了约5个对数点，但仍保持在15个对数点。这种周收入差异源于约10个对数点的小时工资差异和更长的工时（5个对数点）。工时差异部分反映了工会解决就业不足的能力，使得工会工人的工作时间更接近其期望工时，而非工会工人则不然。传统上对小时工资差异的关注低估了工会在确保工人获得期望的带薪工时、从而维持其周收入方面所发挥的重要作用。

32470.title: Inflation and Trading
32470.authors: Philip Schnorpfeil, Michael Weber, Andreas Hackethal
32470.abstract: We study how investors respond to inflation combining a customized survey experiment with trading data at a time of historically high inflation. Investors' beliefs about the stock return-inflation relation are very heterogeneous in the cross section and on average too optimistic. Moreover, many investors appear unaware of inflation-hedging strategies despite being otherwise well-informed about inflation and asset returns. Consequently, whereas exogenous shifts in inflation expectations do not impact return expectations, information on past returns during periods of high inflation leads to negative updating about the perceived stock-return impact of inflation, which feeds into return expectations and subsequent actual trading behavior.
32470.zh_abstract: 我们结合定制的调查实验与历史高通胀时期的交易数据，研究投资者如何应对通胀。投资者关于股票收益-通胀关系的信念在横截面上非常异质，且平均而言过于乐观。此外，许多投资者似乎对通胀对冲策略缺乏了解，尽管他们对通胀和资产回报的其他方面信息掌握良好。因此，虽然通胀预期的外生变化不会影响收益预期，但关于高通胀时期历史回报的信息会导致投资者对通胀感知的股票收益影响进行负面更新，这进而影响收益预期和随后的实际交易行为。
32470.meta: Programs：AP, EFG, ME；JEL：C93, D14, D83, D84, E22, E31, E44, G11, G51

32469.title: What Went Wrong with Federal Student Loans?
32469.zh_title: 联邦学生贷款出了什么问题？
32469.abstract: At a time when the returns to college and graduate school are at historic highs, why do so many students struggle with their student loans? The increase in aggregate student debt and the struggles of today’s student loan borrowers can be traced to changes in federal policies intended to broaden access to federal aid and educational opportunities, and which increased enrollment and borrowing in higher-risk circumstances. Starting in the late 1990s, policymakers weakened regulations that had constrained institutions from enrolling aid-dependent students. This led to rising enrollment of relatively disadvantaged students, but primarily at poor-performing, low-value institutions whose students systematically failed to complete a degree, struggled to repay their loans, defaulted at high rates, and foundered in the job market. As these new borrowers experienced similarly poor outcomes, their loans piled up, loan performance deteriorated, and with it the finances of the federal program. The crisis illustrates the important role that educational institutions play in access to postsecondary education and student outcomes, and difficulty of using broadly-available loans to subsidize investments in education when there is so much heterogeneity in outcomes across institutions and programs and in the ability to repay of students.
32469.zh_abstract: 在大学和研究生教育的回报率处于历史高位之际，为何如此多的学生在偿还学生贷款方面遇到困难？学生债务总额的增加以及当今学生贷款借款人的困境，可以追溯到旨在扩大联邦援助和教育机会获取的联邦政策变化，这些变化增加了高风险情况下的入学率和借贷。从20世纪90年代末开始，政策制定者削弱了此前限制机构招收依赖援助学生的法规。这导致相对弱势学生的入学率上升，但主要是在表现不佳、价值低的院校，这些院校的学生系统性地未能完成学位、难以偿还贷款、违约率高，并且在就业市场上举步维艰。随着这些新借款人经历同样糟糕的结果，他们的贷款堆积起来，贷款表现恶化，联邦项目的财务状况也随之恶化。这场危机说明了教育机构在高等教育入学和学生成果方面的重要作用，以及在院校和项目之间结果以及学生偿还能力存在巨大异质性的情况下，利用广泛可得的贷款来补贴教育投资的困难。
32469.meta: Programs：CF, ED, LS, PE；JEL：G0, G5, G50, G59, H81, I20, I22

32468.title: Paper Tiger? Chinese Science and Home Bias in Citations
32468.zh_title: 纸老虎？中国科学与引用中的本土偏好
32468.authors: Shumin Qiu, Claudia Steinwender, Pierre Azoulay
32468.abstract: We investigate the phenomenon of home bias in scientific citations, where researchers disproportionately cite work from their own country. We develop a benchmark for expected citations based on the relative size of countries, defining home bias as deviations from this norm. Our findings reveal that China exhibits the largest home bias across all major countries and in nearly all scientific fields studied. This stands in contrast to the pattern of home bias for China’s trade in goods and services, where China does not stand out from most industrialized countries. After adjusting citation counts for home bias, we demonstrate that China’s apparent rise in citation rankings is overstated. Our adjusted ranking places China fourth globally, behind the US, the UK, and Germany, tempering the perception of China’s scientific dominance.
32468.zh_abstract: 我们研究了科学引用中的本土偏好现象，即研究人员不成比例地引用本国的工作。我们基于国家的相对规模建立了一个预期引用的基准，将偏离这一基准定义为本土偏好。我们的研究结果显示，在所有主要国家和几乎所有研究的科学领域中，中国表现出最大的本土偏好。这与中国商品和服务贸易中的本土偏好模式形成对比，在贸易方面中国并不比大多数工业化国家突出。在根据本土偏好调整引用计数后，我们证明中国在引用排名中的明显上升被夸大了。调整后的排名将中国置于全球第四位，落后于美国、英国和德国，从而缓和了对中国科学主导地位的看法。

32467.title: Shaping Inequality and Intergenerational Persistence of Poverty: Free College or Better Schools
32467.zh_title: 塑造不平等与贫困的代际持续性：免费大学还是更好的学校
32467.authors: Dirk Krueger, Alexander Ludwig, Irina Popova
32467.abstract: We evaluate the aggregate, distributional and welfare consequences of alternative government education policies to encourage college completion, such as making college free and improving funding for public schooling. To do so, we construct a general equilibrium overlapping generations model with intergenerational linkages, a higher education choice as well as a multi-stage human capital production process during childhood and adolescence with parental and government schooling investments. The model features rich cross-sectional heterogeneity, distinguishes between single and married parents, and is disciplined by US household survey data on income, wealth, education and time use. Studying the transitions induced by unexpected policy reforms we show that the “free college” and the “better schools” reform generate significant welfare gains, which take time to materialize and are lower in general than in partial equilibrium. It is optimal to combine both reforms: tuition subsidies make college affordable even for children from poorer parental backgrounds and better schools increase human capital thereby reducing dropout risk.
32467.zh_abstract: 我们评估了替代性政府教育政策（如免费大学和改善公立学校资助）在鼓励大学完成方面的总体、分配和福利后果。为此，我们构建了一个具有代际联系、高等教育选择以及儿童和青少年时期多阶段人力资本生产过程的世代交叠一般均衡模型，其中包含父母和政府的学校教育投资。该模型具有丰富的横截面异质性，区分了单亲父母和已婚父母，并受到美国关于收入、财富、教育和时间使用的家庭调查数据的约束。通过研究意外政策改革引发的转型，我们表明“免费大学”和“更好的学校”改革产生了显著的福利收益，这些收益需要时间才能实现，并且通常低于局部均衡中的收益。将两种改革结合起来是最优的：学费补贴使来自贫困家庭背景的儿童也能负担得起大学，而更好的学校则提高了人力资本，从而降低了辍学风险。
32467.meta: Programs：CH, EFG, PE；JEL：D15, D31, E24, I24

32466.title: When Protectionism Kills Talent
32466.authors: Mehmet I. Canayaz, Isil Erel, Umit G. Gurun, Yufeng Wu
32466.abstract: Protectionist policies intended to revitalize US chip manufacturing backfired, ultimately weakening the domestic workforce they aimed to rebuild. Instead of fostering talent growth, these measures resulted in a significant decline in hiring for critical science and engineering roles, particularly in entry-level positions and at firms heavily impacted by tariffs. Companies heavily reliant on foreign talent cut back on domestic recruitment and instead shifted to hiring in countries with more favorable immigration policies. US protectionism also discouraged students from pursuing chip-related degrees, leading to a contraction in the domestic talent pipeline. Our conceptual model, which demonstrates how labor supply constraints and rising costs undermine the effectiveness of protectionism, provides a theoretical foundation for these findings.
32466.zh_abstract: 旨在振兴美国芯片制造业的保护主义政策产生了反效果，最终削弱了它们本欲重建的国内劳动力队伍。这些措施非但没有促进人才增长，反而导致关键科学与工程岗位的招聘显著下降，尤其是在初级职位以及受关税影响严重的公司。严重依赖外国人才的企业削减了国内招聘，转而将招聘活动转移到移民政策更友好的国家。美国的保护主义也阻碍了学生攻读芯片相关学位，导致国内人才储备萎缩。我们的概念模型展示了劳动力供给约束和成本上升如何削弱保护主义的有效性，为这些发现提供了理论基础。
32466.meta: Programs：CF, LS, POL；JEL：F16, G15, J21, J23, L1, O3

32465.title: Sustained Debt Reduction: The Jamaica Exception
32465.zh_title: 持续的债务削减：牙买加的特例
32465.authors: Serkan Arslanalp, Barry Eichengreen, Peter Blair Henry
32465.abstract: Reducing high public debts is key for countries seeking to restore fiscal capacity and resilience in the wake of recent crises. But large debt reductions are rare. Jamaica stands out for reducing its debt from 144 percent of GDP to 72 percent over the last decade, a record achieved by running large, persistent primary budget surpluses. Well-designed fiscal rules combined with social partnership agreements making for fiscal ownership are at the root of its achievement.
32465.zh_abstract: 降低高额公共债务对于各国在近期危机后恢复财政能力和韧性至关重要。但大规模的债务削减十分罕见。牙买加在过去十年中脱颖而出，将其债务从GDP的144%降至72%，这一成就通过持续维持大规模的基本预算盈余实现。精心设计的财政规则与促进财政自主权的社会伙伴关系协议是其成功的根本原因。

32464.title: Wage Insurance for Displaced Workers
32464.zh_title: 针对失业工人的工资保险
32464.authors: Benjamin G. Hyman, Brian K. Kovak, Adam Leive
32464.abstract: Wage insurance provides income support to displaced workers who find reemployment at a lower wage. We analyze wage insurance in the context of the U.S. Trade Adjustment Assistance (TAA) program by merging linked employer-employee Census data to TAA petitions and leveraging a discontinuity in eligibility based on worker age. Wage insurance eligibility increases short-run employment probabilities and leads to higher long-run cumulative earnings. We find shorter non-employment durations largely drive increased long-term earnings among workers eligible for wage insurance. Our results are quantitatively consistent with a standard non-stationary partial equilibrium search model. The program is self-financing even under conservative assumptions.
32464.zh_abstract: 工资保险为那些以较低工资重新就业的失业工人提供收入支持。我们通过将关联的雇主-雇员人口普查数据与贸易调整援助（TAA）申请数据合并，并利用基于工人年龄的资格认定中的不连续性，分析了美国贸易调整援助（TAA）项目背景下的工资保险。工资保险资格提高了短期就业概率，并带来了更高的长期累积收入。我们发现，更短的非就业持续时间在很大程度上推动了有资格获得工资保险的工人长期收入的增加。我们的结果在数量上与标准的非平稳局部均衡搜索模型一致。即使在保守假设下，该项目也能实现自筹资金。
32464.meta: Programs：AG, ITI, LS, PE；JEL：H50, J64, J65

32463.title: The Effects of Emergency Rental Assistance During the Pandemic: Evidence from Four Cities
32463.zh_title: 疫情期间紧急租金援助的效果：来自四个城市的证据
32463.authors: Robert Collinson, Anthony A. DeFusco, John Eric Humphries, Benjamin J. Keys, David C. Phillips, Vincent Reina, Patrick S. Turner, Winnie van Dijk
32463.abstract: Short-term rental assistance expanded to unprecedented scale during the COVID-19 pandemic. We evaluate five programs distributing over $\$200$ million through lottery, using administrative and survey data to assess effects on rent payment, housing stability, financial distress, and health. Assistance led to increases in rent payment and reduced concerns about eviction, with suggestive improvements in self-reported mental and physical health. In contrast with pre-pandemic emergency rental assistance, we find little effect on housing stability or financial distress. Explanations for these muted effects include: eviction moratoria weakening the link between rent and displacement, expanded safety net programs, and market softening favoring tenants.
32463.zh_abstract: 在COVID-19大流行期间，短期租金援助的规模扩大到了前所未有的程度。我们评估了五个通过抽签方式分配超过2亿美元的项目，利用行政和调查数据来评估其对租金支付、住房稳定性、财务困境和健康的影响。援助导致租金支付增加，并减少了对被驱逐的担忧，同时有迹象表明自我报告的心理和身体健康状况有所改善。与大流行前的紧急租金援助相比，我们发现其对住房稳定性或财务困境的影响甚微。对这些微弱效果的解释包括：驱逐禁令削弱了租金与流离失所之间的联系、安全网项目的扩大以及市场疲软有利于租户。

32462.title: Self-fulfilling fluctuations in HANK economies
32462.zh_title: HANK经济体中的自我实现波动
32462.abstract: We show that in Heterogeneous-Agent New-Keynesian (HANK) economies with countercyclical risk the natural interest rate is endogenous and co-moves with output, leaving the economy sus-ceptible to self-fulfilling fluctuations. Unlike in Representative-Agent New-Keynesian models, the Taylor principle is not sufficient to guarantee uniqueness of equilibrium in HANK if risk is even mildly countercyclical: multiple bounded-equilibria exist, no matter how strongly monetary policy responds to changes in inflation. For an active-monetary policy to eliminate self-fulfilling fluctua-tions, it must stabilize the endogenous natural rate fluctuations. Alternatively, a passive-monetary and active-fiscal regime can also eliminate equilibrium multiplicity.
32462.zh_abstract: 我们表明，在具有逆周期风险的异质性代理人新凯恩斯（HANK）经济体中，自然利率是内生的，并与产出共同变动，使经济容易受到自我实现波动的影响。与代表性代理人新凯恩斯模型不同，如果风险即使是温和的逆周期，泰勒原理不足以保证HANK中均衡的唯一性：无论货币政策对通胀变化的反应有多强烈，都存在多个有界均衡。要消除自我实现波动，积极的货币政策必须稳定内生的自然利率波动。或者，消极货币与积极财政的政策组合也能消除均衡的多重性。

32461.title: Estimating the Effects of Political Pressure on the Fed: A Narrative Approach with New Data
32461.zh_title: 估算政治压力对美联储的影响：基于新数据的叙事方法
32461.abstract: This paper combines new data and a narrative approach to identify shocks to political pressure on the Federal Reserve. From archival records, I build a data set of personal interactions between U.S. Presidents and Fed officials between 1933 and 2016. Since personal interactions do not necessarily reflect political pressure, I develop a narrative identification strategy based on President Nixon's pressure on Fed Chair Burns. I exploit this narrative through restrictions on a structural vector autoregression that includes the personal interaction data. I find that political pressure shocks (i) increase inflation strongly and persistently, (ii) lead to statistically weak negative effects on activity, (iii) contributed to inflationary episodes outside of the Nixon era, and (iv) transmit differently from standard expansionary monetary policy shocks, by having a stronger effect on inflation expectations. Quantitatively, increasing political pressure by half as much as Nixon, for six months, raises the price level more than 8%.
32461.zh_abstract: 本文结合新数据和叙事方法来识别对美联储的政治压力冲击。根据档案记录，我构建了一个1933年至2016年间美国总统与美联储官员之间个人互动的数据集。由于个人互动并不一定反映政治压力，我基于尼克松总统对美联储主席伯恩斯施加压力的叙事，发展了一种叙事识别策略。我通过一个包含个人互动数据的结构向量自回归模型中的约束来利用这一叙事。我发现，政治压力冲击会（i）强烈且持续地推高通胀，（ii）对经济活动产生统计上微弱的负面影响，（iii）在尼克松时代之外的通胀事件中也有所贡献，并且（iv）其传导方式与标准的扩张性货币政策冲击不同，对通胀预期有更强的影响。从数量上看，将政治压力提高到尼克松时期的一半水平，并持续六个月，会使价格水平上升超过8%。

32460.title: A Flexible Model of Food Security: Estimation and Implications for Prediction
32460.zh_title: 一个灵活的粮食安全模型：估计及其对预测的启示
32460.authors: Will Davis, Jose O. Xilau, Rusty Tchernis, Christian A. Gregory
32460.abstract: We propose a novel Bayesian Graded Response Model (BGRM) for food security measurement. Our BGRM has several attractive features. It produces continuous food security estimates and measures of estimation uncertainty at the household level. Unlike the USDA’s official measurement model, the BGRM can be used with binary and polytomous items. We further modify our BGRM to include any combination of binary, ordered polytomous, and continuous variables. With data from the 2017-18 National Health and Nutrition Examination Survey (NHANES), we estimate our BGRM for responses to the 10 adult core Food Security Module (FSM) questions. We find substantial uncertainty in household-level estimates, emphasizing the inherent uncertainty of latent trait estimation. We observe overlap in BGRM estimates across USDA-defined food security categories and significant variation within categories. We estimate our model using Current Population Survey (CPS) data as a robustness check. CPS results are qualitatively similar to those from the NHANES, highlighting possible implications for national USDA food security estimates. We explore the BGRM’s ability to explain variations in health outcomes associated with food security and compare results to those produced using standard USDA category definitions. Finally, we demonstrate the BGRM’s flexibility by incorporating an additional continuous variable, the Healthy Eating Index (HEI), into the model, capturing nutrition quality and food security information in a novel latent construct. The adaptability of our BGRM positions it as a versatile tool for measuring food security and other latent traits requiring a diverse range of variable types like nutrition security.
32460.zh_abstract: 我们提出了一种新颖的贝叶斯分级响应模型（BGRM）用于粮食安全测量。我们的BGRM具有几个吸引人的特点。它能在家庭层面产生连续的粮食安全估计值和估计不确定性度量。与美国农业部的官方测量模型不同，BGRM可用于二元和多项项目。我们进一步修改了BGRM，使其能够包含二元、有序多项和连续变量的任意组合。利用2017-18年全国健康与营养检查调查（NHANES）的数据，我们针对10个成人核心粮食安全模块（FSM）问题的回答估计了BGRM。我们发现家庭层面估计存在相当大的不确定性，这突显了潜在特质估计固有的不确定性。我们观察到，在美国农业部定义的粮食安全类别之间，BGRM估计值存在重叠，且类别内部存在显著变异。我们使用当前人口调查（CPS）数据作为稳健性检验来估计模型。CPS的结果在性质上与NHANES的结果相似，凸显了对美国农业部全国粮食安全估计可能产生的影响。我们探讨了BGRM解释与粮食安全相关的健康结果变异的能力，并将结果与使用标准美国农业部类别定义产生的结果进行比较。最后，我们通过将一个额外的连续变量——健康饮食指数（HEI）纳入模型，展示BGRM的灵活性，在一个新颖的潜在构念中捕捉营养质量和粮食安全信息。我们BGRM的适应性使其成为测量粮食安全以及其他需要多种变量类型（如营养安全）的潜在特质的通用工具。

32459.title: Voluntary Emission Restraints in Developing Economies: The Role of Trade Policy
32459.zh_title: 发展中经济体的自愿减排：贸易政策的作用
32459.authors: Lorenzo Caliendo, Marcelo Dolabella, Mauricio Moreira, Matthew Murillo, Fernando Parro
32459.abstract: We study the role of trade policy in one of the most pressing climate policy challenges that developing countries face: meeting voluntary emission restraints (VERs). To do so, we develop a general equilibrium trade model that extends Caliendo and Parro (2015) in three dimensions. First, we model extractive sectors that feature a continuum of producers with heterogeneous productivity, demanding labor, dirty natural resources, and intermediate goods from all industries. Second, we consider that production generates different amounts of emissions across sectors and countries, and households experience disutility from carbon emissions, modeled as a pure externality as in Shapiro (2021). Third, we model a general set of taxes along the value chain—on production, intermediate and final consumption, and on labor—which allows for different options of carbon taxes and tariffs that impact emissions and other outcomes in general equilibrium. In our quantitative analysis, we focus on two groups of policies: those that are in the traditional realm of trade policy, related to tariff reform and potential emission biases; and those that combine a Pigouvian carbon tax with border adjustments. Our main findings point to a nuanced role of trade policy as a climate policy in developing economies. Although it is effective in mitigating emission leakages, such leakages are small in magnitude, and border adjustment tariffs have collateral effects in terms of trade declines, and in many countries, welfare losses. These findings contrast with the implications of climate policy in large economies, where emission leakages are much more significant and the impact on trade less costly. Our main results also indicate that carbon taxes and tariffs will not be enough for most developing countries to meet their net-zero emission targets dictated by the VERs.
32459.zh_abstract: 我们研究了贸易政策在发展中国家面临的最紧迫的气候政策挑战之一——实现自愿减排（VERs）中的作用。为此，我们开发了一个一般均衡贸易模型，该模型在三个维度上扩展了Caliendo和Parro（2015）的研究。首先，我们对采掘部门进行建模，该部门具有一系列生产率异质的生产者，需要劳动力、污染性自然资源以及来自所有行业的中间产品。其次，我们考虑生产在不同部门和不同国家产生不同数量的排放，并且家庭因碳排放而遭受效用损失，这被建模为一种纯粹的外部性，如Shapiro（2021）所述。第三，我们沿价值链对一系列税收进行建模——包括生产税、中间和最终消费税以及劳动税——这允许不同的碳税和关税选项，这些选项在一般均衡中影响排放和其他结果。在我们的定量分析中，我们关注两类政策：一类属于传统贸易政策领域，涉及关税改革和潜在的排放偏差；另一类则将庇古税式的碳税与边境调整相结合。我们的主要发现指出了贸易政策作为发展中国家气候政策的一个微妙作用。尽管它在减轻排放泄漏方面是有效的，但这种泄漏的规模很小，而且边境调整关税在贸易下降以及许多国家的福利损失方面具有附带效应。这些发现与大型经济体中气候政策的含义形成对比，在大型经济体中，排放泄漏更为显著，对贸易的影响成本也更低。我们的主要结果还表明，对于大多数发展中国家而言，碳税和关税不足以使其达到自愿减排所规定的净零排放目标。
32459.meta: Programs：ITI；JEL：A10, F13, F18, F6, H23, Q5, Q56

32458.title: Designing Dynamic Reassignment Mechanisms: Evidence from GP Allocation
32458.zh_title: 设计动态重新分配机制：来自全科医生分配的实证证据
32458.authors: Ingrid Huitfeldt, Victoria Marone, Daniel C. Waldinger
32458.abstract: Many centralized assignment systems seek to not only provide good matches for participants’ current needs, but also to accommodate changes in preferences and circumstances. We study the problem of designing a dynamic reassignment mechanism in the context of Norway’s system for allocating patients to general practitioners (GPs). We provide direct evidence of misallocation under the current system––patients sitting on waitlists for each others’ GPs, but who cannot trade––and analyze an alternative mechanism that adapts the Top-Trading Cycles (TTC) algorithm to a dynamic environment. In contrast to the static case, dynamic TTC may leave some agents worse off relative to a status quo where trades are not permitted, introducing novel concerns about fairness. We empirically evaluate how this mechanism would perform by estimating a structural model of switching behavior and GP choice. While introducing TTC would on average reduce waiting times and increase patient welfare––with especially large benefits for female patients and recent movers––patients endowed with undesirable GPs would be harmed. Adjustments to the priority system can avoid harming this group while preserving most of the gains from TTC.
32458.zh_abstract: 许多集中分配系统不仅旨在为参与者的当前需求提供良好匹配，还需适应偏好和情况的变化。我们以挪威将患者分配给全科医生的系统为背景，研究动态重新分配机制的设计问题。我们提供了当前系统下分配不当的直接证据——患者彼此在对方的全科医生候补名单上，却无法进行交换——并分析了一种将顶级交易循环算法应用于动态环境的替代机制。与静态情况相比，动态顶级交易循环可能使某些参与者的境况比不允许交易的状态更差，从而引发关于公平性的新担忧。我们通过估计一个关于转换行为和全科医生选择的结构模型，实证评估了该机制的表现。虽然引入顶级交易循环平均而言会减少等待时间并提高患者福利——对女性患者和新搬来者尤其有利——但被分配到不理想全科医生的患者将受到损害。对优先级系统的调整可以避免损害这一群体，同时保留顶级交易循环的大部分收益。

32457.title: Impact of Retail CBDC on Digital Payments, and Bank Deposits: Evidence from India
32457.zh_title: 零售央行数字货币对数字支付和银行存款的影响：来自印度的证据
32457.authors: Marco Di Maggio, Pulak Ghosh, Soumya Kanti Ghosh, Andrew Wu
32457.abstract: Interest in central bank digital currencies (CBDCs) has been burgeoning with 134 countries now exploring its implementation. In December 2022, India started its CBDC pilot program to continue its transition towards a digitized payments economy. This paper presents the first empirical analysis utilizing detailed transaction data to explore the dynamics between CBDCs and existing digital payment methods, as well as the implications of increased CBDC usage on traditional bank deposits. Our findings reveal that policies which increase transaction costs for current digital payment methods catalyze a substitution effect, bolstering CBDC adoption. Furthermore, an uptick in CBDC usage is associated with a notable decline in bank, cash, and savings deposits, suggesting potential paths to bank disintermediation. This study contributes critical insights into the evolving competition between digital currencies and established financial infrastructures, highlighting the transformative potential of CBDCs on the broader economy.
32457.zh_abstract: 随着134个国家现在正在探索央行数字货币的实施，对其的兴趣正在迅速增长。2022年12月，印度启动了央行数字货币试点项目，以继续其向数字化支付经济的转型。本文首次利用详细的交易数据进行实证分析，探讨央行数字货币与现有数字支付方式之间的动态关系，以及央行数字货币使用增加对传统银行存款的影响。我们的研究结果表明，提高现有数字支付方式交易成本的政策会催化替代效应，促进央行数字货币的采用。此外，央行数字货币使用量的增加与银行、现金和储蓄存款的显著下降相关，这表明了银行去中介化的潜在路径。本研究为数字货币与既定金融基础设施之间不断演变的竞争提供了关键见解，突显了央行数字货币对更广泛经济的变革潜力。

32456.title: A Sharp Test for the Judge Leniency Design
32456.zh_title: 法官宽大处理设计的严格检验
32456.authors: Mohamed Coulibaly, Yu-Chin Hsu, Ismael Mourifié, Yuanyuan Wan
32456.abstract: We propose a new specification test to assess the validity of the judge leniency design. We characterize a set of sharp testable implications, which exploit all the relevant information in the observed data distribution to detect violations of the judge leniency design assumptions. The proposed sharp test is asymptotically valid and consistent and will not make discordant recommendations. When the judge’s leniency design assumptions are rejected, we propose a way to salvage the model using partial monotonicity and exclusion assumptions, under which a variant of the Local Instrumental Variable (LIV) estimand can recover the Marginal Treatment Effect. Simulation studies show our test outperforms existing non-sharp tests by significant margins. We apply our test to assess the validity of the judge leniency design using data from Stevenson (2018), and it rejects the validity for three crime categories: robbery, drug selling, and drug possession.
32456.zh_abstract: 我们提出了一种新的设定检验，以评估法官宽大处理设计的有效性。我们刻画了一组严格的检验含义，这些含义利用观测数据分布中的所有相关信息来检测对法官宽大处理设计假设的违反。所提出的严格检验是渐近有效且一致的，并且不会给出不一致的建议。当法官宽大处理设计假设被拒绝时，我们提出了一种利用部分单调性和排除性假设来挽救模型的方法，在此假设下，局部工具变量估计量的一个变体可以恢复边际处理效应。模拟研究表明，我们的检验在显著程度上优于现有的非严格检验。我们使用Stevenson（2018）的数据应用我们的检验来评估法官宽大处理设计的有效性，结果拒绝了抢劫、毒品销售和毒品持有这三个犯罪类别的有效性。

32455.title: Can Gun Violence be Deterred at Low Cost? Evidence from a Randomized Experiment in New York City
32455.zh_title: 枪支暴力能否以低成本被威慑？来自纽约市随机实验的证据
32455.authors: Oludamilare Aboaba, Aaron Chalfin, Michael LaForest Tucker, Lucie Parker, Patrick Sharkey
32455.abstract: Can gun violence be deterred at low cost? We report the results of a randomized experiment of a messaging intervention which was designed to reduce gun violence among individuals under parole supervision with a prior violent felony conviction or firearm arrest. The intervention consisted of a group meeting in which high-risk paroled individuals were notified of the sanction they would face upon reoffending while being offered community resources to support re- integration into the community. The program did not lead to a reduction in gun violence or create community spillover effects but did reduce parole violations by 15%. Potential mechanisms and implications for similar programs are discussed.
32455.zh_abstract: 枪支暴力能否以低成本被威慑？我们报告了一项信息干预随机实验的结果，该实验旨在减少处于假释监督下且有先前暴力重罪定罪或枪支逮捕记录的个人的枪支暴力。干预措施包括一次小组会议，会上高风险假释人员被告知再次犯罪将面临的制裁，同时提供社区资源以支持其重新融入社区。该计划并未导致枪支暴力减少或产生社区溢出效应，但确实将假释违规行为减少了15%。本文讨论了潜在机制及对类似项目的启示。

32499.title: Discount Factors and Monetary Policy: Evidence from Dual-Listed Stocks
32499.zh_title: 贴现因子与货币政策：来自双重上市股票的证据
32499.authors: Quentin Vandeweyer, Minghao Yang, Constantine Yannelis
32499.abstract: This paper studies the transmission of monetary policy to the stock market through investors’ discount factors. To isolate this channel, we investigate the effect of US monetary policy surprises on the ratio of prices of the same stock listed simultaneously in Hong Kong and Mainland China, and thereby control for revisions in cash-flow expectations. We find this channel to be strong and asymmetric, with the effect driven by surprise monetary policy interest rate cuts. A 100 basis point surprise cut results in a 30 basis point increase in the ratio of stock prices over 5 days. These results suggest significant slow-moving reductions in stock market risk premia following accommodating monetary policy surprises.
32499.zh_abstract: 本文研究货币政策通过投资者贴现因子向股票市场的传导。为了隔离这一渠道，我们考察了美国货币政策意外对同时在香港和中国内地上市的同一股票价格比率的影响，从而控制了现金流预期的修正。我们发现这一渠道强劲且不对称，其效应由意外的货币政策降息所驱动。100个基点的意外降息导致5天内股票价格比率上升30个基点。这些结果表明，在宽松的货币政策意外之后，股票市场风险溢价存在显著的缓慢下降。
32499.meta: Programs：AP, CF, ME, PE；JEL：E5, E51, E58, G12, G14

32498.title: A Quantile Model of Firm Investment
32498.zh_title: 企业投资的分位数模型
32498.authors: Heitor Almeida, Murillo Campello, Luciano I. de Castro, Antonio F. Galvao Jr
32498.abstract: We develop a dynamic model of firm investment under uncertainty that captures firms’ risk attitude using quantile preferences. The firm maximizes its present value, defined as current profits and investment plus the discounted value of the τ-quantile of its value next period. In our framework, τ ∈ (0, 1) parametrizes the firm’s attitude toward downside risk. The model implies that the firm’s investment policy equates the marginal cost of capital with the τ-quantile of the discounted present value of future marginal profits — investment depends directly on the firm’s risk attitude. We further integrate our model into a “q-theory” of investment. Numerical solutions show how heterogeneity across τ-quantiles impacts the value of the firm and investment decisions. Empirical estimations of the quantile investment model show that the strength of the relation between investment and Tobin’s q increases as downside risk aversion decreases. Estimates of firms’ risk attitude reveal evidence of high levels of downside risk aversion.
32498.zh_abstract: 我们构建了一个不确定性下企业投资的动态模型，该模型利用分位数偏好来刻画企业的风险态度。企业最大化其现值，该现值定义为当前利润和投资加上下一期企业价值τ分位数的折现值。在我们的框架中，τ ∈ (0, 1) 参数化了企业对下行风险的态度。该模型意味着，企业的投资政策使得资本的边际成本等于未来边际利润折现现值的τ分位数——投资直接取决于企业的风险态度。我们进一步将我们的模型整合到投资的“q理论”中。数值解展示了τ分位数之间的异质性如何影响企业价值和投资决策。对分位数投资模型的实证估计表明，投资与托宾q之间关系的强度随着下行风险厌恶程度的降低而增加。对企业风险态度的估计揭示了高水平下行风险厌恶的证据。

32497.title: People's Understanding of Inflation
32497.zh_title: 人们对通货膨胀的理解
32497.authors: Alberto Binetti, Francesco Nuzzi, Stefanie Stantcheva
32497.abstract: This paper studies people’s understanding of inflation–their perceived causes, consequences, trade-offs–and the policies supported to mitigate its effects. We design a new, detailed online survey based on the rich existing literature in economics with two experimental components— a conjoint experiment and an information experiment—to examine how well public views align with established economic theories. Our key findings show that the major perceived causes of inflation include government actions, such as increased foreign aid and war-related expenditures, alongside rises in production costs attributed to recent events like the COVID-19 pandemic, oil price fluctuations, and supply chain disruptions. Respondents anticipate many negative consequences of inflation but the most noted one is the increased complexity and difficulty in household decision-making. Partisan differences emerge distinctly, with Republicans more likely to attribute inflation to government policies and foresee broader negative outcomes, whereas Democrats anticipate greater inequality effects. Inflation is perceived as an unambiguously negative phenomenon without any potential positive economic correlates. Notably, there is a widespread belief that managing inflation can be achieved without significant trade-offs, such as reducing economic activity or increasing unemployment. These perceptions are hard to move experimentally. In terms of policy responses, there is resistance to monetary tightening, consistent with the perceived absence of trade-offs and the belief that it is unnecessary to reduce economic activity to fight inflation. The widespread misconception that inflation rises following increases in interest rates even leads to support for rate cuts to reduce inflation. There is a clear preference for policies that are perceived to have other benefits, such as reducing government debt in progressive ways or increasing corporate taxes, and for support for vulnerable households, despite potential inflationary effects.
32497.zh_abstract: 本文研究人们对通货膨胀的理解——他们感知到的原因、后果、权衡——以及为减轻其影响而支持的政策。我们基于经济学中丰富的现有文献设计了一项新的、详细的在线调查，包含两个实验组成部分——一个联合实验和一个信息实验——以检验公众观点与既定经济理论的一致程度。我们的主要发现表明，通货膨胀的主要感知原因包括政府行动，例如增加对外援助和与战争相关的支出，以及归因于近期事件（如COVID-19大流行、油价波动和供应链中断）的生产成本上升。受访者预期通货膨胀会带来许多负面后果，但最值得注意的是家庭决策的复杂性和难度增加。党派差异明显出现，共和党人更可能将通货膨胀归因于政府政策并预见更广泛的负面结果，而民主党人则预期更大的不平等效应。通货膨胀被视为一种明确的负面现象，没有任何潜在的正向经济关联。值得注意的是，人们普遍认为可以在不付出重大权衡（如减少经济活动或增加失业）的情况下实现管理通货膨胀。这些认知在实验上难以改变。在政策应对方面，存在对货币紧缩的抵制，这与感知到的权衡缺失以及认为没有必要为了对抗通货膨胀而减少经济活动的信念一致。通货膨胀在利率上升后也会上升的普遍误解甚至导致人们支持降息以降低通货膨胀。人们明显偏好那些被认为具有其他好处的政策，例如以渐进方式减少政府债务或增加企业税，以及支持弱势家庭，尽管这些政策可能具有通胀效应。
32497.meta: Programs：EFG, IFM, ME, POL；JEL：E03, E24, E31, E58, E71

32496.title: School Equalization in the Shadow of Jim Crow: Causes and Consequences of Resource Disparity in Mississippi circa 1940
32496.zh_title: 吉姆·克劳阴影下的学校均等化：1940年左右密西西比州资源差距的原因与后果
32496.authors: David Card, Leah Clark, Ciprian Domnisoru, Lowell Taylor
32496.abstract: A school finance equalization program established in Mississippi in 1920 failed to help many of the state's Black students – an outcome that was typical in the segregated U.S. South (Horace Mann Bond, 1934). In majority-Black school districts, local decision-makers overwhelmingly favored white schools when allotting funds from the state's preexisting per capita fund, and the resulting high expenditures on white students rendered these districts ineligible for the equalization program. Thus, while Black students residing in majority-white districts benefited from increased spending and standards for Black schools, those in majority-Black districts continued to experience extremely low – and even worsening – school funding. We model the processes that led the so-called equalization policy to create disparities in schooling resources for Black students, and estimate effects on Black children using both a neighboring-counties design and an IV strategy. We find that local educational spending had large impacts on Black enrollment rates, as reported in the 1940 census, with Black educational attainment increasing in marginal spending. Finally, we link the 1940 and 2000 censuses to show that Black children exposed to higher levels of school expenditures had significantly more completed schooling and higher income late in life.
32496.zh_abstract: 密西西比州于1920年建立的一项学校财政均等化计划未能帮助该州的许多黑人学生——这是美国南部种族隔离地区的典型结果（Horace Mann Bond, 1934）。在黑人占多数的学区，地方决策者在分配该州先前存在的人均基金时压倒性地偏袒白人学校，由此导致的白人学生高支出使得这些学区没有资格参加均等化计划。因此，虽然居住在白人占多数学区的黑人学生受益于黑人学校支出的增加和标准的提高，但那些居住在黑人占多数学区的黑人学生继续经历极低甚至恶化的学校经费。我们模拟了导致所谓均等化政策为黑人学生创造教育资源差距的过程，并使用邻近县设计和工具变量策略估计了对黑人儿童的影响。我们发现，根据1940年人口普查报告，地方教育支出对黑人入学率产生了巨大影响，黑人教育程度随边际支出增加而提高。最后，我们将1940年和2000年的人口普查数据联系起来，表明接触更高水平学校支出的黑人儿童在晚年拥有显著更高的完成学业年限和收入。

32495.title: Double Robustness of Local Projections and Some Unpleasant VARithmetic
32495.zh_title: 局部投影的双重稳健性与一些不愉快的VAR计量问题
32495.authors: José Luis Montiel Olea, Mikkel Plagborg-Møller, Eric Qian, Christian K. Wolf
32495.abstract: We consider impulse response inference in a locally misspecified vector autoregression (VAR) model. The conventional local projection (LP) confidence interval has correct coverage even when the misspecification is so large that it can be detected with probability approaching 1. This result follows from a “double robustness” property analogous to that of popular partially linear regression estimators. In contrast, the conventional VAR confidence interval with short-to-moderate lag length can severely undercover, even for misspecification that is small, economically plausible, and difficult to detect statistically. There is no free lunch: the VAR confidence interval has robust coverage only if the lag length is so large that the interval is as wide as the LP interval.
32495.zh_abstract: 我们考虑在局部误设的向量自回归（VAR）模型中的脉冲响应推断。即使误设大到可以以趋近于1的概率被检测到，传统的局部投影（LP）置信区间仍具有正确的覆盖概率。这一结果源于一种类似于流行的部分线性回归估计量的“双重稳健性”性质。相比之下，具有短到中等滞后长度的传统VAR置信区间可能会严重覆盖不足，即使对于很小、经济上合理且难以统计检测的误设也是如此。没有免费的午餐：只有当滞后长度大到使得区间与LP区间一样宽时，VAR置信区间才具有稳健的覆盖概率。

32494.title: Nominal Devaluations, Inflation and Inequality
32494.zh_title: 名义贬值、通货膨胀与不平等
32494.authors: Andrés Blanco, Andrés Drenik, Emilio Zaratiegui
32494.abstract: We study the distribution of labor income during large devaluations. Across countries, inequality falls after large devaluations within the context of a surge in inflation and a fall and subsequent recovery of real labor income. To better understand inequality dynamics, we use a novel administrative dataset covering the 2002 Argentinean devaluation. We show that following a homogeneous fall in real labor income across workers, the bottom of the income distribution recovers faster than the top. Low labor mobility and lack of union coverage among high-income workers explain their slow recovery.
32494.zh_abstract: 我们研究大规模贬值期间劳动收入的分配。跨国来看，在大幅贬值之后，伴随着通货膨胀飙升以及实际劳动收入下降随后恢复，不平等程度下降。为了更好地理解不平等动态，我们使用了一个涵盖2002年阿根廷贬值的新型行政数据集。我们表明，在全体工人实际劳动收入同质下降之后，收入分配底部的恢复速度快于顶部。低收入工人中低劳动流动性和缺乏工会覆盖解释了其缓慢的恢复。

32493.title: An Empirical Framework For Matching With Imperfect Competition
32493.zh_title: 不完全竞争匹配的实证框架
32493.authors: Mons Chan, Kory Kroft, Elena Mattana, Ismael Mourifié
32493.abstract: This paper builds, identifies and estimates a model of the labor market that features strategic interactions in wage setting and two-sided heterogeneity in order to shed light on the sources of wage inequality. We provide a tractable characterization of the model equilibrium and demonstrate its existence and uniqueness. This characterization of the equilibrium allows us to derive a rich set of comparative statics and to gauge the relative contributions of worker skill, preference for amenities and strategic interactions to equilibrium wage inequality. Using instrumental variables, we establish identification of labor demand and supply parameters and estimate them using matched employer-employee data from Denmark. Using our estimated structural model, we perform a series of counterfactual analyses in order to provide a quantitative evaluation of the main sources of wage inequality in Denmark.
32493.zh_abstract: 本文构建、识别并估计了一个劳动力市场模型，该模型具有工资设定中的战略互动和双边异质性，以揭示工资不平等的来源。我们提供了模型均衡的可处理特征描述，并证明了其存在性和唯一性。这种均衡特征描述使我们能够推导出丰富的比较静态分析，并衡量工人技能、对便利品的偏好以及战略互动对均衡工资不平等的相对贡献。使用工具变量，我们建立了劳动力需求和供给参数的识别，并使用来自丹麦的匹配雇主-雇员数据对其进行估计。利用我们估计的结构模型，我们进行了一系列反事实分析，以对丹麦工资不平等的主要来源进行定量评估。
32493.meta: Programs：IO, LS；JEL：J0, J20, J3, J31, J42

32492.title: The Effect of Inequality on Redistribution: An Econometric Analysis
32492.zh_title: 不平等对再分配的影响：一项计量经济学分析
32492.authors: Michael J. Boskin, Kareem Elnahal, Adam Zhang
32492.abstract: Using data on U.S. state and federal taxes and transfers over a quarter century, we estimate a regression model that yields the marginal effect of any shift of market income share from one quintile to another on the entire post tax, post-transfer income distribution. We identify exogenous income distribution changes and account for reverse causality using instruments based on exposure to international trade shocks, international commodity price shocks and national industry demand shocks, as well as lagged endogenous variables, with controls for the level of income, the business cycle and demographics. We find the degree of attenuation of market income shifts initially increases in quintile rank, peaks at the middle quintile and then falls for higher income quintiles, consistent with median voter political economy theory and what Stigler called Director’s Law. We also provide evidence of considerable and systematic spillover effects on quintiles neither gaining nor losing in the “experiments,” also favoring the middle quintile, what we label the greedy median voter. “Voting” and “income insurance” coalition analyses are presented. We find a strong negative relationship between average real income and redistribution and a modest effect of two year led inequality.
32492.zh_abstract: 利用美国州和联邦税收与转移支付四分之一个世纪的数据，我们估计了一个回归模型，该模型得出市场收入份额从一个五分位组转移到另一个五分位组的任何变化对整个税后、转移后收入分布的边际效应。我们识别出外生的收入分配变化，并使用基于国际贸易冲击暴露、国际大宗商品价格冲击和国内行业需求冲击的工具变量以及滞后的内生变量，同时控制收入水平、商业周期和人口统计变量，来处理反向因果关系。我们发现，市场收入变化的衰减程度最初随五分位组排名增加而增加，在中位五分位组达到峰值，然后对较高收入五分位组下降，这与中位选民政治经济学理论以及斯蒂格勒所称的“迪雷克托定律”一致。我们还提供了证据，表明在“实验”中既未获得也未失去的五分位组存在显著且系统的溢出效应，同样有利于中位五分位组，我们称之为贪婪的中位选民。本文还呈现了“投票”和“收入保险”联盟分析。我们发现平均实际收入与再分配之间存在强烈的负相关关系，而领先两年的不平等对再分配的影响较小。

32491.title: Keeping Up Appearances: An Experimental Investigation of Socioeconomic Status Signaling to Avoid Discrimination
32491.zh_title: 维持体面：一项关于为避免歧视而进行社会经济地位信号传递的实验研究
32491.authors: Pascaline Dupas, Marcel Fafchamps, Laura Hernandez-Nunez
32491.abstract: We investigate the welfare cost of relative rank considerations, using a series of vignettes and lab-in-the-field experiments with over 2,000 individuals in Abidjan, Côte d’Ivoire. We show that: (1) people perceived to be of very low rank are considered more likely to be sidelined from beneficial opportunities in many aspects of life; and (2) in response, people invest in their appearance and distort consumption choices in order to appear of higher rank. These effects are economically significant. As predicted by a simple signaling model, the distortion concerns people with low (but not too low) socio-economic status and the SES range concerned varies across types of beneficial opportunities.
32491.zh_abstract: 我们利用在科特迪瓦阿比让对超过2000名个体进行的一系列情景实验和实验室实地实验，研究了相对排名考虑的福利成本。我们表明：（1）被认为排名极低的人更可能被认为在生活的许多方面被排除在有益机会之外；（2）作为回应，人们投资于自己的外表并扭曲消费选择，以显得排名更高。这些影响在经济上是显著的。正如一个简单的信号模型所预测的那样，这种扭曲涉及社会经济地位低（但并非极低）的人群，并且所涉及的社会经济地位范围因有益机会的类型而异。

32490.title: Returns Heterogeneity and Consumption Inequality Over the Life Cycle
32490.zh_title: 生命周期中的回报异质性与消费不平等
32490.abstract: A recent literature argues that persistent heterogeneity in wealth returns ("type dependence") as well as a positive association with wealth levels ("scale dependence") play an important role for explaining features of the wealth distribution, especially its extreme concentration at the top. In contrast, traditional models of wealth accumulation emphasize the role of persistent differences in labor earnings. Using panel data from the PSID, we first document that a common unobserved component (which we interpret as the endowment of cognitive and non-cognitive skills of an individual) drives persistent heterogeneity in both wealth returns and labor earnings. We embed these features of the joint wealth return-earnings process in a life-cycle model of consumer behavior and show that ignoring them would dramatically understate average returns for people at the top of the wealth distribution as well as the level and rise of consumption inequality over the life cycle.
32490.zh_abstract: 近期的文献认为，财富回报的持续性异质性（“类型依赖性”）以及其与财富水平的正相关关系（“规模依赖性”）在解释财富分布特征，尤其是顶部的极端集中现象中扮演着重要角色。相比之下，传统的财富积累模型则强调劳动收入的持续性差异。利用PSID的面板数据，我们首先发现一个共同不可观测的成分（我们将其解释为个人认知和非认知技能的禀赋）驱动了财富回报和劳动收入两方面的持续性异质性。我们将这些联合财富回报-收入过程的特征嵌入到消费者行为的生命周期模型中，并表明，忽略这些特征将严重低估财富分布顶端人群的平均回报，以及消费不平等在整个生命周期中的水平和上升幅度。

32489.title: Explaining Adverse Cholesterol Levels and Distinct Gender Patterns in an Indonesian Population Compared with the U.S.
32489.zh_title: 解释印度尼西亚人群与美国相比的不良胆固醇水平及独特的性别模式
32489.authors: Ralph I. Lawton, Elizabeth Frankenberg, Teresa Seeman, Arun S. Karlamangla, Cecep Sumantri, Duncan Thomas
32489.abstract: With the expiration of many tax cuts and unmet climate targets, 2025 could be a crucial year for climate policy in the United States. Using an integrated model of energy supply and demand, this paper aims to assess climate policies that the U.S. federal government may consider in 2025 and to evaluate emissions reductions, abatement costs, fiscal impacts, and household energy expenditures across a range of policy scenarios. The model results show several key findings. First, the emissions reductions of the Inflation Reduction Act are significantly augmented under scenarios that add a modest carbon fee or, to a lesser extent, that implement a clean electricity standard in the power sector. Second, net fiscal costs can be substantially reduced in scenarios that include a carbon fee, especially if fossil fuel exports are taxed. Third, expanding the IRA tax credits yields modest additional emissions reductions with higher fiscal costs. Finally, although none of the policy combinations across these scenarios achieve the U.S. target of a 50-52% economy-wide emissions reduction by 2030 from 2005 levels, the carbon fee and clean electricity standard scenarios achieve these levels between 2030 and 2035.
32489.zh_abstract: 随着许多减税政策的到期和气候目标未能实现，2025年可能成为美国气候政策的关键一年。本文利用一个能源供需综合模型，旨在评估美国联邦政府可能在2025年考虑的气候政策，并在一系列政策情景下评估减排量、减排成本、财政影响以及家庭能源支出。模型结果显示了几个关键发现。首先，在增加适度碳费或（在较小程度上）在电力部门实施清洁电力标准的情景下，《通胀削减法案》的减排效果显著增强。其次，在包含碳费的情景下，净财政成本可以大幅降低，特别是如果对化石燃料出口征税。第三，扩大IRA税收抵免会带来适度的额外减排，但财政成本更高。最后，尽管这些情景中的任何政策组合都未能实现美国到2030年将全经济范围排放量从2005年水平减少50-52%的目标，但碳费和清洁电力标准情景在2030年至2035年间达到了这些水平。

32488.title: Household Inflation Expectations: An Overview of Recent Insights for Monetary Policy
32488.zh_title: 家庭通胀预期：近期对货币政策启示的概述
32488.authors: Francesco D’Acunto, Evangelos Charalambakis, Dimitris Georgarakos, Geoff Kenny, Justus Meyer, Michael Weber
32488.abstract: This paper discusses the recent wave of research that has emphasized the importance of measures of consumers’ inflation expectations. In contrast to other measures of expected inflation, such as for experts or financial market participants, consumers’ inflation expectations capture the broader distribution of societal beliefs about inflation. This research has revealed very significant deviations from traditional assumptions about rationality in consumers’ expectations formation. However, households do act on their beliefs about inflation, though in heterogeneous ways that can depart from the predictions of conventional economic models. Recent euro area experiences highlight the importance of tracking the degree of anchoring in consumers’ inflation expectations in a way that considers their inherent complexity, heterogeneity, and subjectivity. On average, consumers’ medium and longer-term expectations deviate noticeably in levels from central bank targets and, in contrast with expert expectations, often co-move more closely with shorter-term inflation news. By stepping up their engagement with the wider public, central banks may be able to influence expectations by building up greater knowledge and trust and thereby support more effective monetary transmission. Communication efforts need to be persistent because central banks must compete with many other demands on consumers’ attention.
32488.zh_abstract: 本文讨论了近期强调消费者通胀预期重要性的研究浪潮。与专家或金融市场参与者的其他预期通胀指标相比，消费者的通胀预期捕捉了社会对通胀信念的更广泛分布。这项研究揭示了消费者预期形成过程中与传统理性假设的显著偏离。然而，家庭确实会根据其对通胀的信念采取行动，尽管方式各异，可能偏离传统经济模型的预测。近期欧元区的经验凸显了追踪消费者通胀预期锚定程度的重要性，且需考虑其固有的复杂性、异质性和主观性。平均而言，消费者的中期和长期预期水平明显偏离央行目标，并且与专家预期相反，它们通常与短期通胀消息的联动更为紧密。通过加强与公众的互动，央行或许能够通过建立更多的知识和信任来影响预期，从而支持更有效的货币政策传导。沟通努力需要持之以恒，因为央行必须与众多争夺消费者注意力的其他需求竞争。

32487.title: The Simple Macroeconomics of AI
32487.zh_title: 人工智能的简单宏观经济学
32487.abstract: This paper evaluates claims about large macroeconomic implications of new advances in AI. It starts from a task-based model of AI’s effects, working through automation and task complementarities. So long as AI’s microeconomic effects are driven by cost savings/productivity improvements at the task level, its macroeconomic consequences will be given by a version of Hulten’s theorem: GDP and aggregate productivity gains can be estimated by what fraction of tasks are impacted and average task-level cost savings. Using existing estimates on exposure to AI and productivity improvements at the task level, these macroeconomic effects appear nontrivial but modest—no more than a 0.66% increase in total factor productivity (TFP) over 10 years. The paper then argues that even these estimates could be exaggerated, because early evidence is from easy-to-learn tasks, whereas some of the future effects will come from hard-to-learn tasks, where there are many context-dependent factors affecting decision-making and no objective outcome measures from which to learn successful performance. Consequently, predicted TFP gains over the next 10 years are even more modest and are predicted to be less than 0.53%. I also explore AI’s wage and inequality effects. I show theoretically that even when AI improves the productivity of low-skill workers in certain tasks (without creating new tasks for them), this may increase rather than reduce inequality. Empirically, I find that AI advances are unlikely to increase inequality as much as previous automation technologies because their impact is more equally distributed across demographic groups, but there is also no evidence that AI will reduce labor income inequality. Instead, AI is predicted to widen the gap between capital and labor income. Finally, some of the new tasks created by AI may have negative social value (such as design of algorithms for online manipulation), and I discuss how to incorporate the macroeconomic effects of new tasks that may have negative social value.
32487.zh_abstract: 本文评估了关于人工智能新进展可能带来巨大宏观经济影响的论断。文章从一个基于任务的AI影响模型出发，该模型通过自动化和任务互补性发挥作用。只要AI的微观经济效应是由任务层面的成本节约/生产率提升驱动的，其宏观经济后果将由Hulten定理的一个版本给出：GDP和总体生产率增长可以通过受影响的任份额和平均任务层面成本节约来估算。利用现有关于AI暴露度和任务层面生产率提升的估计，这些宏观经济效应看似不容忽视但较为温和——在10年内，全要素生产率（TFP）增长不超过0.66%。文章随后论证，即使是这些估计也可能被夸大，因为早期证据来自易于学习的任务，而未来部分效应将来自难以学习的任务，在这些任务中存在许多影响决策的上下文相关因素，并且没有客观的结果衡量标准来学习成功表现。因此，预测未来10年的TFP增长更为温和，预计低于0.53%。我还探讨了AI对工资和不平等的影响。我从理论上证明，即使AI在某些任务中提高了低技能工人的生产率（而没有为他们创造新任务），这也可能增加而非减少不平等。实证上，我发现AI进步不太可能像以往的自动化技术那样加剧不平等，因为其影响在不同人口群体间分布更均匀，但也没有证据表明AI会减少劳动收入不平等。相反，AI预计将扩大资本与劳动收入之间的差距。最后，AI创造的一些新任务可能具有负社会价值（例如设计用于在线操纵的算法），我讨论了如何纳入可能具有负社会价值的新任务的宏观经济效应。
32487.meta: Programs：EFG, LS, PR；JEL：E24, J24, O30, O33

32486.title: Licensure as a Credential: Evidence on Unemployment Protection and Inequality from the Great Recession and COVID-19
32486.zh_title: 作为凭证的职业许可：来自大衰退和COVID-19关于失业保护和不平等的证据
32486.authors: Peter Q. Blair, Bobby W. Chung
32486.abstract: Recent research shows that education shields workers from job loss in recessions. We test whether occupational licensing, another widespread credential, provides similar unemployment protection during recessions. Using individual-level licensing data and supplemental state-occupation measures, we study both the Great Recession and the COVID-19 recession. Licensed workers experienced a 0.8-1 percentage point (27%) smaller increase in unemployment than comparable unlicensed workers in both downturns. Ignoring these unemployment effects understates inequality between licensed and unlicensed workers by 3–7%. Our findings suggest that, like education, licensing not only raises wages but also protects jobs, thereby amplifying inequality during economic downturns.
32486.zh_abstract: 近期研究表明，教育能在经济衰退中保护工人免受失业。我们检验了另一种普遍存在的凭证——职业许可——是否能在衰退期间提供类似的失业保护。利用个人层面的许可数据以及补充性的州-职业层面度量，我们研究了大衰退和COVID-19衰退。在这两次衰退中，持证工人的失业率增幅比类似的无证工人小0.8-1个百分点（27%）。忽略这些失业效应会使持证与无证工人之间的不平等被低估3-7%。我们的发现表明，与教育类似，职业许可不仅提高了工资，还保护了就业，从而在经济衰退期间加剧了不平等。
32486.meta: Programs：DAE, ED, IFM, LE, LS；JEL：E02, E24, J08, J23, J24, J44, J64, K31, L31, M51

32485.title: Algorithmic Bias and Historical Injustice: Race and Digital Profiling
32485.zh_title: 算法偏见与历史不公：种族与数字画像
32485.authors: Abigail Matthew, Amalia R. Miller, Catherine Tucker
32485.abstract: This paper studies the implications of attempts at "ethnic-affinity" profiling on Facebook that reflects users' engagement with content on Facebook. Profiling by ethnic-affinity is highly correlated with Census estimates of population race by geography. However, more users were profiled as African-American in former slave states relative to the baseline population. This occurs because the targeting algorithm was better at identifying Black users through differentiated engagement with cultural content in these states. This implies that policies restricting the collection of racial identity data will be unsuccessful due to the existence of proxies, and that relying on proxies may introduce troubling biases.
32485.zh_abstract: 本文研究了Facebook上反映用户与内容互动的“族裔亲和”画像尝试的含义。基于族裔亲和的画像与人口普查按地理区域估计的种族人口高度相关。然而，相对于基线人口，更多用户在前奴隶州被画像为非裔美国人。这是因为在这些州，目标算法通过差异化的文化内容互动更善于识别黑人用户。这意味着限制种族身份数据收集的政策将因代理变量的存在而失败，并且依赖代理变量可能会引入令人不安的偏见。
32485.meta: Programs：LE, LS, PR；JEL：J15, J78, K24, M37

32446.title: Career Expectations and Outcomes: Evidence (on Gender Gaps) from the Economics Job Market
32446.zh_title: 职业期望与结果：来自经济学就业市场的证据（关于性别差距）
32446.authors: Brooke Helppie McFall, Eric D. Parolin, Basit Zafar
32446.abstract: This paper investigates gender gaps in long-term career expectations and outcomes of PhD candidates in economics. For this purpose, we match rich survey data on PhD candidates (from the 2008-2010 job market cohorts) to public data on job histories and publication records through 2022. We document four novel empirical facts: (1) there is a robust gender gap in career expectations, with females about 10 percentage points less likely to ex-ante expect to get tenure or publish regularly; (2) the gender gap in expectations is remarkably similar to the gap observed for academic outcomes; (3) expectations are similarly predictive of outcomes for males and females. In addition, the predictive power of expectations does not differ by the relationship status of the individual; and (4) gender gaps in expectations can explain about 19% and 13% of the ex-post gaps in tenure and publications, respectively.
32446.zh_abstract: 本文研究了经济学博士候选人在长期职业期望和结果方面的性别差距。为此，我们将关于博士候选人（来自2008-2010年就业市场队列）的丰富调查数据与截至2022年的工作经历和发表记录的公开数据进行了匹配。我们记录了四个新颖的实证事实：（1）职业期望存在稳健的性别差距，女性事先预期获得终身教职或定期发表论文的可能性约低10个百分点；（2）期望中的性别差距与学术结果中观察到的差距非常相似；（3）期望对男性和女性结果的预测能力相似。此外，期望的预测能力不因个人的关系状况而异；（4）期望中的性别差距可以分别解释事后终身教职差距和发表差距的约19%和13%。
